faqs.question: How are the placements at Amity University Mohali?
faqs.answer: Over 500 companies participated in the placement drive conducted at the Amity University Mohali for 2020 and 8,000 students were placed. Amity alumni are receiving the highest package of INR 2 crore p.a. More than 5,000 companies visited the campus, 8,000 students were placed, and the placements during the lockdown were 1,500. The top companies taking part in the placement drive at Amity University Mohali are Accenture, Amazon, Bata, and others.

faqs.answer: Amity University has created a brand value with multiple campuses across different cities. The university provide placements support to the students. Its total tuition fee for the BPharm course is INR 7.52 lakh. Some of the top companies, which have made job offers during the Amity Punjab placements are Accenture, Amazon, Airtel, Capgemini, etc.

faqs.question: What is the Amity University Mohali selection procedure for BSc?
faqs.answer: Amity University Mohali offers seat in its BSc programmes on a merit-basis. Hence, the applicants performance in the last qualifying exam, i.e., Class 12 is evaluated for selection purposes. However, to be eligible for the course, applicants must be Class 12 pass with 50% - 60% aggregate. The relevant documents must also be with the students for verification purposes.

college_info.intro:
Amity Mohali University gives BSc & BTech as flagship programmes. The programmes given by the college emphasizes on the futuristic technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), ML (Machine Learning), Cloud Computing, IoT & even Blockchain. Along with the regular programmes, the university also gives research-driven & industry-led experience to students. The 4-yr BTech CSE course is given in the following specialisations:
Mohali Amity University BTech students are taught technical skills which help them become industry peofessionals.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus is worth for money, small, and well-managed.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. Average package is approximately 6 LPA - 7 LPA. I don't know exactly about companies. Approximately 80-90% of students got internships. Top roles are offered. I don't know but toppers for moderately satisfied with the result but as college is new so its still exploring.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is best. Classrooms and campus have AC and are clean. I am not a hostel one but hostel mates always share positive reviews about it. But its too strict on the timings and food order. Mess is overall 2 rated not recommended from my side but other food options are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: In short, good reputed university in Punjab.

review_content.Placements: Currently, the placement records are limited as the course has only been running for a year. Top recruiters visit the campus regularly, and approximately 80 to 85 percent of students are placed each year. Those who do not secure a job placement typically secure internships instead.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building is very large, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus at every location. The labs are well-equipped with the latest technology and are among the best, featuring modern equipment. In my opinion, it has the best technology and modern equipment in labs in Punjab, especially among universities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Human Genetics and Molecular Medicine (Research) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with almost everything - Good placements, pretty campus, healthy environment.

review_content.Placements: My seniors told me most of them have been placed by the university in prestigious companies like Cipla, Torrent Pharma, etc. The packages range from 2.5 LPA to 7.5 LPA. All the students got it from my batch. Professors are very helpful in this area. I am hoping for a job as a bioinformatics assistant or a clinical genetics lab assistant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is freely available to the whole campus. There are various labs for various fields like biochemistry, microbiology, preparatory labs, etc. The food is average but the menu keeps changing so it offers a variety of food. A separate gym and indoor sports area are available. The outdoor games ground is something of an interesting sight. The hostel rooms are separate for each individual even when sharing you have your own wardrobe and a bed. There is a wellness center if you get sick. Library is the most beautiful and comfortable space in there. I personally love it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The law campus of Amity University is the best, and the faculty is also very cooperative.

review_content.Placements: This year, the law batch will graduate, and placements are also provided for students from other departments. Many students were placed last year. You can visit the Amity University Punjab page on Instagram to see our university events. Students have won many prizes.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are average, and the rules at Amity University Punjab could be improved. The Wi-Fi quality is poor. Labs and classrooms are good, and the library is excellent. The friendly environment makes you feel at peace. Many students visit the library every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Clinical Psychology with Research - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amity University, Punjab.

review_content.Placements: The campus is newly established therefore placements are limited. Only limited companies visit for campus recruitment. But still, you can expect an average salary package of around 10 LPA. The highest salary package offered in the last year was 30 LPA. There are no placements for psychology UG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not very large, but not very small also. I expected it to be slightly larger, but it's okay. Food courts are available. We have a sports ground, gym, and garden. If you are looking for something crazy, then it is not available. But if you are peace-loving, then welcome.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Nice Crowd and good opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Roles offered are Digital Marketer, Performance Marketer, Operations Executive, Sales Executive, HR Executive, Operations Analyst, Senior Sales Executive, and HR Manager. Other roles such as Sales Executive, Affiliated Marketing Manager, Affiliated Marketing Associate, Accounts Manager, and Accounts Executive are also offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best infrastructure in terms of building, area, hygiene, and security. The building is huge and welcoming and the area is also spacious for each and every department and activity, including clubs.

course_faqs.question: Does Amity Punjab refund BSc fees after withdrawal?
course_faqs.answer: Amity University, Punjab may refund BSc fee, if a candidate withdraws admission up to 15 days before the start of academic session. A fee refund is initiated after admission of 100% of security deposit and semester fee with a deduction of 5%. It is done with a maximum of INR 5,000 as processing charges. This information is not specific to the Punjab campus. Hence, can vary.

admission_overview.college_name: Amity University Mohali Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Amity University Mohali Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Amity University Mohali admission 2026 is currently open. The aspiring candidates can apply to the courses provided at Amity University Mohali by visiting their official website. The university offers over 20 programmes at the UG, PG and doctorate levels. Admission to the programme such as BA, BSc, MA and MSc are merit-based. The entrance exams accepted include CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ CUET, etc. Admission 2026 to programmes offered at Amity University Mohali is both merit-based and entrance-based.

eligibility_selection.title: Amity University Mohali Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Amity Mohali offers BSc, MBA, BTech, MSc and LLM programmes. faqs.question: How do I get admission to Amity University, Punjab?
faqs.answer: Admission to various UG and PG courses is both merit and entrance based. Aspirants need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place before applying for this course. For BTech course, the university conducts its in-house entrance exam, i.e., Amity Joint Entrance Exam. The university accepts various national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT, MAT, etc. Other than that, for some UG and PG courses, students are selected based on their merit performance in the previous qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Can students get direct admission to various courses at Amity University Mohali?
faqs.answer: Direct admissions for UG courses are offered to candidates securing above 80% aggregate in Class 12. Such candidates are exempted from the selection process. Selection will be only based on the Amity application form. Direct admission based on class 12 percentage is not applicable for the programmes of Design /Architecture /Education /Fashion /Law /Physical Education. For complete information visit the official website of the university.

faqs.question: What is the required qualification to get into BSc in Forensic Science course of Amity Punjab?
faqs.answer: Amity University, Mohali admit candidates to its BSc Forensic Science course based on performance in Class 12 or equivalent examination. Students who are Class 12 or equivalent pass with at least 50% aggregate with PCM/ PCB can apply for admission. The pass certificates also have to be submitted for verification purposes.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Amity University Mohali?
faqs.answer: Over 500 companies participated in the placement drive conducted at the Amity University Mohali for 2020 and 8,000 students were placed. Amity alumni are receiving the highest package of INR 2 crore p.a. More than 5,000 companies visited the campus, 8,000 students were placed, and the placements during the lockdown were 1,500. The top companies taking part in the placement drive at Amity University Mohali are Accenture, Amazon, Bata, and others.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Mohali Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is worth for money, small, and well-managed.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. Classrooms and campus have AC and are clean. I am not a hostel one but hostel mates always share positive reviews about it. But its too strict on the timings and food order. Mess is overall 2 rated not recommended from my side but other food options are also available.

reviews.review_heading: In short, good reputed university in Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The building is very large, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus at every location. The labs are well-equipped with the latest technology and are among the best, featuring modern equipment. In my opinion, it has the best technology and modern equipment in labs in Punjab, especially among universities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with almost everything - Good placements, pretty campus, healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is freely available to the whole campus. There are various labs for various fields like biochemistry, microbiology, preparatory labs, etc. The food is average but the menu keeps changing so it offers a variety of food. A separate gym and indoor sports area are available. The outdoor games ground is something of an interesting sight. The hostel rooms are separate for each individual even when sharing you have your own wardrobe and a bed. There is a wellness center if you get sick. Library i...

reviews.review_heading: The law campus of Amity University is the best, and the faculty is also very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are average, and the rules at Amity University Punjab could be improved. The Wi-Fi quality is poor. Labs and classrooms are good, and the library is excellent. The friendly environment makes you feel at peace. Many students visit the library every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not very large, but not very small also. I expected it to be slightly larger, but it's okay. Food courts are available. We have a sports ground, gym, and garden. If you are looking for something crazy, then it is not available. But if you are peace-loving, then welcome.

reviews.review_heading: Nice Crowd and good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure in terms of building, area, hygiene, and security. The building is huge and welcoming and the area is also spacious for each and every department and activity, including clubs.

reviews.review_heading: A Decent College if You Want to Study While Enjoying Your Life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for B.Tech and overall is great. We have computer labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi, however, is VERY slow, almost negligible, so that’s a disadvantage. However, the ethernet in labs has a good speed. Hostel’s infrastructure is also great, and all things are in good condition as the university is new. The downside is the mess and canteen are the same, and the food is not that good. Medical facilities are good; you can get the medicine you need for your problem...

reviews.review_heading: BCA from the Amity University, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Punjab has really good infrastructure for the BCA course. For the coding practices of the students, the lab facility is available. Library, Wi-Fi, canteen, sports, medical, etc. Facilities were available for the students. The food in the college canteen was good. hostel facility was also available for the students. Multiple Sports facilities were given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: A good university is beneficial for students in terms of academics and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text:
The campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classroom with smart boards, well-equipped computer labs and a comprehensive library with a vast collection of books and digital resources.
The hostels are well maintained, with clean and spacious rooms, 24/7 security and Wi-Fi access. There is an on-campus medical centre with qualified doctors, as well as emergency services.
The university has excellent sport facilities, including a gym, basketball and cricket fields and facilities for indoor games lik...

reviews.review_heading: MCA from the Amity University which offers good facilities and faculty to the students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for this MCA course at the Amity University was good. Students were getting computer labs for the programming practice. Necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, library, Canteen, sports, medical etc. Were available in the college campus. All these facilities were properly managed by the college management. Hostel facility was also available for the students. Multiple sports facility were given to the student. Food in the college canteen and hostel mess was good en...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our university is newly established. It is still under construction. Our university is beautiful. Labs are well-equipped. They have almost all the equipment. The library is well-built and peaceful. It has many books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college will be having a lot of potential in the next 3-4 years.
reviews.review_text: Classroom and Wi-Fi are good. Our college is still under construction and takes some time. Hostels are not too good. The mess facility is average. They do not provide many options.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, but opportunity wise, this college is not worth it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good here, even hostels are good and nearby there are many PGs too, labs are built nicely. Classrooms are spacious and the library is really good to study as its really a vibe there. Indoor games are also available and you can spend time with your friends there.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University Punjab is a recently opened university and is still developing in many things.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very nice. Everything, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and the library, is newly added, so their functioning is very good. The hostel is also very well developed. The quality of food in our cafeteria is good, but it is quite more expensive than outside.

reviews.review_heading: Your 2nd home, a new and adventurous chapter, is like a rollercoaster, boring, fun, and everything.
reviews.review_text: Every class has Wi-Fi with good connectivity, but it can be slow sometimes. It has projectors, mics, and ACs. Classrooms have sockets. Well-furnished libraries and labs, with all the equipped machines and needed materials. Medical rooms are available with good staff. The canteen food is hygienic, and there is another café shop on campus. Well-made grounds and 2-level parking with good security The overall security of the college is also great.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Swasthya Kalyan Homoeopathic Medical College: fulfilled expectations.

review_content.Placements: There are no placement opportunities in our institution. As we are from the medical field, there are no such placements or companies. Students have to open their own clinic, or they can give government examinations for jobs. No placements are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very average. There is no air conditioning, no Wi-Fi. The library is there, but there are only books related to the course, and sometimes those are also not available to students. The campus is very small. The hostel for girls is also very far from the college, and there is no hostel for boys. There are no sports complex, ground, or any other gaming area, neither inside nor outside. The canteen only provides tea, coffee, and chips, nothing else.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Swasthya Kalyan Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary offered is Rs.80,000 per annum and the lowest salary is Rs.65,000 per annum. Hospitals near our college hire students. Low-economy family students get internships. Top roles offered are nursing, physiotherapy, and homeopathy. Every student gets good placements in well-reputed and renowned companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nursing lab, fundamental lab, pediatric lab, OBG lab, computer classrooms, library, and audio-visual aided rooms are available in our college. Good ventilation, spacious hostel rooms, hygienic food, and medical care are provided.

reviews.review_heading: All were good and gave support.
reviews.review_text: The library and every classroom are big, and some rooms have projectors. Labs are available for blood testing and naturopathic treatments. Overall, the college campus is good. There are good and very nice facilities are available outside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Swasthya Kalyan - A review report.
reviews.review_text: There are projectors in every classroom along with mics and speakers for teachers. It has exhaust fans in classrooms and Wi-Fi facility. Hostel is also 1 KM away from college. We have mess and canteen. Vegetarian and Indian food is prepared there for students.

reviews.review_heading: Swasthya Kalyan Homoeopathic Medical College: fulfilled expectations.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very average. There is no air conditioning, no Wi-Fi. The library is there, but there are only books related to the course, and sometimes those are also not available to students. The campus is very small. The hostel for girls is also very far from the college, and there is no hostel for boys. There are no sports complex, ground, or any other gaming area, neither inside nor outside. The canteen only provides tea, coffee, and chips, nothing else.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Swasthya Kalyan Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Nursing lab, fundamental lab, pediatric lab, OBG lab, computer classrooms, library, and audio-visual aided rooms are available in our college. Good ventilation, spacious hostel rooms, hygienic food, and medical care are provided.

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for G. Pulla Reddy College of Pharmacy admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: G. Pulla Reddy College of Pharmacy is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma. The fee structure for the G Pulla Reddy College of Pharmacy Hyderabad programmes is around INR 2,50,000 to 5,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the G. Pulla Reddy College of Pharmacy is approximately INR 260000 - INR 540000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is absolutely good with good atmosphere and faculty.

review_content.Placements: More than 70% of students are placed with a minimum package of 2 LPA in MNCs. The internships are low. Some highly paid companies are interested, and they are hiring the most people.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and gardens, with a playground and good view of the forest. It has good ventilation and hostel facilities. Food is good. A playground is available, where we play cricket, volleyball, kabaddi etc. Games are played in our college in a good manner.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty are good and have a great experience. They are polite and interactive. We have 3 mid-semester exams and end-semester exam. They make our studies more conceptual and aim to get more marks in the subject we are studying.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Analysis and Quality Assurance - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Students are placed according to the department they study. Around 60% of students are placed on-campus. They also opt for further education. In the current year, recruitment was done by pharma companies such as AGS, Himalaya, and Excelra.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good for our department. The library is equipped with Wi-Fi, and there is a computer lab adjacent to the library. Hostel is not available within the campus. But the area around the college has many hostels and facilities within them vary depending on the individual hostel. There is a wide choice for choosing one.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of G. Pulla Reddy College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: It is not that good nor that bad college. It gets attention from companies but only when students demand jobs through college companies such as Lupin, Novartis, and other pharmaceutical companies and industries like stride organics. This college can easily help you to get placed in those companies especially.
content.Infrastructure: College in total has 9-10 labs which are enough for B. Pharma course training. It also has a great supply of Wi-Fi and internet connection along with a sports room and an auditorium for college events. College also provides a canteen with all kinds of snacks.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: G. Pullareddy College of Pharmacy - Building Pharmacists.

content.Placements: There are a total of 64 members in my class, and placements are neither that good nor that bad. At least 70% of students can be easily placed in growing companies like Lupin and others, although most of the students prefer higher education and going to business.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good. This college has its own auditorium, parking lot, and also a garden on the campus. When it comes to the equipment, it has all the necessary ones in good condition. We also had a sports room and a seminar hall for all the events.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2025

content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and gardens, with a playground and good view of the forest. It has good ventilation and hostel facilities. Food is good. A playground is available, where we play cricket, volleyball, kabaddi etc. Games are played in our college in a good manner.
content.Faculty: The faculty are good and have a great experience. They are polite and interactive. We have 3 mid-semester exams and end-semester exam. They make our studies more conceptual and aim to get more marks in the subject we are studying.

individual_reviews.title: Definitely satisfied with the quality of education which they provide.

content.Placements: 30 percent of students got placed with the highest salary being 3L/annum, average of 2.8L/annum and the lowest salary of 2.5L/annum. It provides good infrastructure for outdoor games and sports, also has all medical facilities but there is no mess in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G. Pulla Reddy College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: College in total has 9-10 labs which are enough for B. Pharma course training. It also has a great supply of Wi-Fi and internet connection along with a sports room and an auditorium for college events. College also provides a canteen with all kinds of snacks.

reviews.review_heading: G. Pullareddy College of Pharmacy - Building Pharmacists.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good. This college has its own auditorium, parking lot, and also a garden on the campus. When it comes to the equipment, it has all the necessary ones in good condition. We also had a sports room and a seminar hall for all the events.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely good with good atmosphere and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and gardens, with a playground and good view of the forest. It has good ventilation and hostel facilities. Food is good. A playground is available, where we play cricket, volleyball, kabaddi etc. Games are played in our college in a good manner.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good for our department. The library is equipped with Wi-Fi, and there is a computer lab adjacent to the library. Hostel is not available within the campus. But the area around the college has many hostels and facilities within them vary depending on the individual hostel. There is a wide choice for choosing one.

reviews.review_heading: Definitely satisfied with the quality of education which they provide.
reviews.review_text: The college has quiet good infrastructure and has provided well-equipped labs, which has the latest editions of books in the library, ventilated classrooms and has wi-fi provision. It provides good infrastructure for outdoor games and sports, also has all medical facilities but there is no mess in college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college as it has good infrastructure, qualified professors and it ranks No.1
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities like separate room for indoor games, volleyball court and badminton court. The college has Wi-Fi which can access by the students if required for their research work and it has computer lab and all the latest equipment. Recently it has brought US Pharmacopiea training which makes the students gain knowledge on the latest equipment in the industrial world.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the college's good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a good library, very good classrooms, and a very good canteen. All medical facilities are available, and the faculty is very friendly. The physical activity is also very good at the college; it is one of the most prestigious colleges. The college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are spacious. They provide medical facilities. They conduct sports and games activities. Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has all the facilities and experienced lecturers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has advanced labs, canteen, playground, and library. There are experienced instructors at the laboratory and other workspaces. We have a basketball court and a small college park.  The quality of our canteen food will be 4 out of 5. We have separate canteens for separate blocks and games. Our laboratory has complete advanced equipment. Our college officially conducts many programs to enhance students knowledge and skills.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has great facilities like separate spaces for indoor games, a volleyball court and a badminton court. The college has Wi-Fi which can access by students whenever needed for their exploration work and it has a PC lab and the most recent hardware. As of late, it has brought US pharmacopoeia preparing which makes the students gain information on the most recent hardware in the modern world. But the college doesn't have its own hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college as it provides good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like elevators are present in the college. Students have to put biometric for daily attendance. There are cameras in the corridors. There is a library, and it gives us books for a year but not all of them, five books are given. There is a computer lab at the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. Infrastructure and facilities are good here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are good. Classrooms are spacious. Our college has lift facility, and every student can make use of it. The library has books and journals related to pharmacy. Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. Hostels are available near the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, and I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Classrooms are equipped with a projector, and there are cameras in the corridor. There is a library, and there is a computer lab beside it. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, but there are many hostels in the surrounding areas.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college. It is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are well and good, and they are monitored by the principal of the college. The infrastructure is good. There is a library, which is equipped with Wi-Fi facility with pretty good signal strength. There is no hostel in our college. However, there are many hostels around the college within a walkable distance. Indoor games and outdoor sports are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, and our college is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good here. The library is equipped with Wi-Fi, newspapers, journals and books related to pharmacy course. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, and most of the teaching takes place through it. Our college does not provide a hostel. There are many hostels in the surrounding areas, and it is not difficult to find if required.

individual_reviews.course: BBA Hons. - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Monark University is really good, and its canteen provides the best food.

content.Placements: There is a 95% pass rate from the course. The college includes top recruiters like Tata, Toyota, Axis Bank, etc. The top roles offered in my course are HR, management, finance, data analytics, marketing, and digital marketing. It also focuses on English communication.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average but flexible. The department is very supportive; all the faculty and staff are very good. The quality of the hostel is average, but the food they provide is really like home. There have been no issues regarding health or safety concerns.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Go for it guys. Really the best.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Students getting placed were 70%. The highest package was 10 LPA+, the lowest was 3 LPA. There are various top recruiters. 35% of students got internships. Managerial roles were the mostly provided roles by the college, course, and recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The college is best in looks, gives you full Bollywood vibes, and the college is surrounded by greenery. Everything is just perfect. The college even had its own ambulance services, and many more things were there in the college and on its campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies for our courses are Zydus, Apollo, and many more known companies. Top roles offered in our courses were a medical representative, pharmacist, medical business, medicine developer, medical researchers and many more like this.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.

content.Placements: In my course, there are minimal students who get placement from colleges, and they also don't provide any internships from their side; we have to search for companies for an internship. Many of us did paid internships instead of internships with Stifund.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our course infrastructure is worth the money.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities provided at our university are 100%. Internships are provided by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Classrooms are big and 25 to 30 personal computers are available in every lab. Library consists of books for every course. Canteen serves good food. Our campus is big. There is a separate building for every course.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are well-graduated. Teaching quality is great. They arrange extra classes for students who joined late. Exams are easy if students study. The pass percentage is based on exams. Experts are invited from the industry to make students industry ready.

faqs.question: Is CUET cumpulsory for MBA admission at Monark University?
faqs.answer: CUET Common University Entrance Test is not needed for MBA at Monark University. Entrance tests scores, including CAT, MAT, or GMAT, can also be considered for MBA courses. Even direct admissions in management quota or merit quota are possible. It would be advisable to log on to the website of the university or directly approach the Admission Office for exact details on entrance tests and other qualifying criteria.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Monark University?
faqs.answer: The answer is that the direct admissions at Monark University are offered for certain programs like B.Tech., directly through merit or in the management quota. For such criteria, the candidate must have a good academic record and a good score in relevant entrance exams. For such criteria and procedures for direct admission, reach the Admission office of the University or look for it at their official website.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Monark University for admission MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates must havepassed 10+2 or equivalent from a recognized board in India. Monark University accepts results from the CAT, MAT, and JEMAT entrance exams for MBA admissions. Candidates' results on the university's entrance exam may also be used to determine their eligibility.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Monark University?
faqs.answer: Yes, is it easy to get admission in Monark University. The university accepts admission based on merit. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. Monark University course admission begins with the online application. Interested candidates can apply directly through the official website.

placement_report.college_name: Monark University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Monark University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Monark University has released the highest package offered during the recent placement drive. According to the latest report, the highest package offered during the recent Monark University placements stood at INR 30 LPA, and the highest stipend offered was INR 40,000 per month. Some of the top recruiters of Monark University include Adani Group, Airtel, TCS, IBM, Voltas, Wipro, etc.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing MBA from Monark University?
faqs.answer: Once an MBA is obtained from Monark University, then, after this two-year graduation program, graduates can check into the host of various roles across finance, marketing, human resource, operations, and consulting sectors. Some common roles include a Marketing Manager, Financial Analyst, Human Resources Manager, Operations Manager, or a Business Consultant. Apart from this, some may even begin their own business or work as leaders in startups. An employment placement cell is there in the university to connect students with recruiters and also build as many opportunities as possible with private as well as government sectors. Employment opportunity increased through networking and internship.

reviews.review_heading: Monark University is really good, and its canteen provides the best food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but flexible. The department is very supportive; all the faculty and staff are very good. The quality of the hostel is average, but the food they provide is really like home. There have been no issues regarding health or safety concerns.

reviews.review_heading: Go for it guys. Really the best.
reviews.review_text: The college is best in looks, gives you full Bollywood vibes, and the college is surrounded by greenery. Everything is just perfect. The college even had its own ambulance services, and many more things were there in the college and on its campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.
reviews.review_text: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.
reviews.review_text: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

reviews.review_heading: Our course infrastructure is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Classrooms are big and 25 to 30 personal computers are available in every lab. Library consists of books for every course. Canteen serves good food. Our campus is big. There is a separate building for every course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Monark University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average with very limited amenities. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Food served in the canteen is costly and the taste is average.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus, supportive faculty, & great opportunities. The university provided scholarships.
reviews.review_text: Very nice college. The open garden and environment were very good. I pursued a B.E. in Mechanical Engineering at Monark University, and the experience was great. The campus was modern with well-equipped labs and a central library. On-campus hostel facilities were clean and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college to study BCA.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was not provided sometimes in our classrooms. Lights were not properly provided. The lab was not good and updated as they used the old version of computers. Classrooms were not good but the library was good. Hostel rooms were old and the canteen was not available. The quality of street food was low but the price was high. Sports were good.

data.description: Monark University has a sprawling campus equipped with state-of-the-art facilities with all the amenities offered at the campus. The university has well-equipped classrooms, library, auditorium, conference hall, sports complex, and others. There's a dedicated transport facility with buses covering major routes in Ahmedabad.

reviews_list.review_title: Varun arjun medical college review.

review_content.Placements: There are 250 students in the MBBS program. After completion of the degree, the students are allowed to work in their choice of hospital; generally, every student gets a job. After the completion of their 4th year, students are posted to Rohilkhand Hospital as a part of their internship, where they also get a stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is decent; it is within the campus and the condition of the hostel is good. There is no lift inside the hostel and Wi-Fi is also not provided. The quality of the food is acceptable. There is diversity in the food provided to the students. Each room consists of two students. 24 hours of electricity and water supply are there. Cleaning is done on a daily basis.

admission_overview.college_name: ICRI Pune Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Dates & Fee

paragraphs: ICRI Pune admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The institute conducts an entrance exam for admission.ICRI Puneoffers UG, PG and doctoral courses in collaboration withAjeenkya DY Patil University. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Management, Science, Arts, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the quick query form, followed by the application form, to apply for admission.

ICRI Pune offers admission to courses based on their performance in the entrance exam. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Candidates must complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below areICRI Pune coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Note:The official website does not mention course-specific criteria. Hence, generic selection criteria is taken.

ICRI Pune admission process includes multiple steps such as registration, selection and fee payment. Candidates need to appear for entrance exam followed by selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in ICRI Pune:
STEP 1: ICRI Pune Application Process 2025

Candidates must first fill out the quick query form available on the institute website. Once the form is reviewed, candidates need to fill out the application form. Candidates can get the form from the ICRI Pune campus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,300 to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

ICRI Pune selects candidates based on a written exam conducted by the institute. Entrance exams are an integral part of the selection process, conducted to judge the knowledge of the candidate which is based on Quantitative ability, Communication, Logical Reasoning, General Knowledge, General English & Aptitude Test. Once the candidates are shortlisted, they further need to come for a personal interview round.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

After the final screening is over, selection letters are issued to candidates. The selection letter will consist of all the necessary details along with a registration date. The students need to pay theICRI Pune feeso to confirm the seat for the course they have applied for.

. ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India. The ICRI Pune Placement Process is presented below:
Various companies are invited to ICRI campus by the active placement cell. Here is the step-by-step process of placements at ICRI:
Companies are given an option to go to any one of the eight campuses for recruitment of students
Companies are assigned a convenient date to follow-up for negotiation
After confirmation provided by the company, a pre-placement talk is arranged on the date with ICRI authorities
After that, companies conduct a test and/or Group Discussion (GD) to shortlist the interested candidates
Shortlisted candidates are then interviewed for final selection by the company
Result of the final selection is usually announced on the day of interview or within 2-3 days

reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: About 70 out of 100 percent of students got placed. I think the highest salary offered is around Rs. 50,000 per month, and the minimum salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, based on their work and dedication. It is compulsory for each student to complete or undergo internships at a company, and it is compulsory for every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides proper and hygienic hostels. It has a good library, and a digital library is also available. In the case of facilities, everything is top-notch as compared to other colleges around Coimbatore. It also provides free Wi-Fi and digital libraries free of cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for MCA course.

review_content.Placements: 60 percent of students were interviewed on campus. The average salary package offered is between 10,000 and 60,000 rupees. Top companies like ICICI Pru Life, State Street, HCL India Pvt. Ltd., TCS Tata Consultancy Services, Muthoot Finance, Tata Communications, Asian Paints, and Athena Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
review_content.Infrastructure: More than four computer laboratories, two canteens, and historic buildings are among the many facilities. The canteens’ food is of high quality. Scholarships are available for kids from low-income families, a green and clean environment is maintained, and a free midday meal programme is provided for those in need.

review_summary.college_name: Bharathidasan University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and good environment surrounded by green fields.

content.Placements: As I am studying in the second year of my college, our college conducts a lot of programs, workshops, and motivational speeches by industrial experts, which help us improve our knowledge and vision towards our career. Companies like TCS and Wipro come for campus interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Basically, the hostel is very good. It has good facilities and a good atmosphere, surrounded by a green environment. Our college hostel guardian is responsible and friendly, which is a plus point. We have good food, a good place to sleep, a good computer lab, a communication lab, and the infrastructure is very good. We also have a multifunctional library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Coimbatore.

content.Placements: Many IT companies like Accenture, Wipro, and TCS visited the campus. There was a placement platform for the students. Many top companies came, and students who got jobs were happy and enjoyed their work. They were in good positions.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a library, labs, and good classrooms. I was not a hostel student. I was a day scholar, and it was awesome. I heard from hostel students in my classroom that there were many games and sports, annual day celebrations, fests, and many other activities in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 70 out of 100 percent of students got placed. I think the highest salary offered is around Rs. 50,000 per month, and the minimum salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, based on their work and dedication. It is compulsory for each student to complete or undergo internships at a company, and it is compulsory for every student.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides proper and hygienic hostels. It has a good library, and a digital library is also available. In the case of facilities, everything is top-notch as compared to other colleges around Coimbatore. It also provides free Wi-Fi and digital libraries free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college for MCA course.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students were interviewed on campus. The average salary package offered is between 10,000 and 60,000 rupees. Top companies like ICICI Pru Life, State Street, HCL India Pvt. Ltd., TCS Tata Consultancy Services, Muthoot Finance, Tata Communications, Asian Paints, and Athena Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: More than four computer laboratories, two canteens, and historic buildings are among the many facilities. The canteens’ food is of high quality. Scholarships are available for kids from low-income families, a green and clean environment is maintained, and a free midday meal programme is provided for those in need.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Social Work (MSW) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bishop Heber College, Social Work Department.

content.Placements: All seniors get placed except for two. There are some campus placements, but most of them get placed outside campus. The starting salary ranges from Rs. 20,000 to 2–4 LPA based on the recruitment. You can be placed as a social worker, therapist, counsellor, community developer, human resources manager, or human resources executive.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and hostels are average compared to other colleges. The library is very good with an e-library. There is a very good canteen and sports facilities. You can even get a sports scholarship. Free Wi-Fi is available if you have a laptop. There are very good computer labs and other labs, such as a botany lab and labs for visual communication.

admission_overview.title: Bharathidasan University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Bharathidasan University admission to most of the UG and PG courses is based on merit. For MBA and MCA, the university accepts state-level entrance exams such as TANCET and CEETA PG, respectively. Bharathidasan University offers numerous courses which include UG, PG and doctoral level programmes. The university also offer five-year and six-year Integrated programmes, and short-term PG Diploma and certificate courses. Besides, the university also has a Centre for Distance and Online Education to offers UG, diploma, certificate and PG courses in distance education mode. Candidates must apply online on the official website of the university for BDU admission.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Bharathidasan University?

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete any UG degree of this university or an equivalent with at least 50% aggregate to apply for Bharathidasan University. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification. Besides, candidates applying for MBA need to qualify TANCET. The selection for MBA Financial Markets will be based on university entrance exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Bharathidasan University?

faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University cutoff for the two-year management course i.e MBA courses is based on CAT and TANCET scores. In order to be eligible for further rounds, candidates must have a valid score in any of the aforementioned courses. Bharathidasan University admission to MBA courses is mainly through affiliated colleges. Bharathidasan University TANCET cutoff 2023 for MBA stood closed at 6950 for JJ College of Arts and Science, at 6804 for Mass College of Arts and Science and at 6677 for Bharathidasan University PG Extension Centre. Also, going as per the last year cutoff, the minimum overall Bharathidasan University CAT cutoff is 85 Percentile, offered through Bharathidasan Institute of Management Trichy. For all the details regarding the Bharathidasan University cutoff 2023, check out this page.
faqs.question: What is Bharathidasan University cutoff?

faqs.answer: Factors affecting Bharathidasan University cutoff are listed below:The total number of seats available for the programme.The number of applications received for the programme.The cutoff trend over the years.Candidate’s category.Aggregate marks of candidates in the qualifying exam.
faqs.question: What factors determine Bharathidasan University Cutoff?

paragraphs: BDU admission processstarts with registration for the preferred course. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. The selection for most of the programmes is entrance-based. Below is step-wise admission process for Bharathidasan University:
STEP 1: BDU Application Process 2025

Candidates can collect the prospectus and the application form from the university campus or apply online. Aspirants applying for CDOE courses have to pay an application fee of INR 250 for UG courses, INR 400 for PG and INR 550 for MBA/ MCA. The application fee for PG extension centre courses is INR 500.
STEP 2: Selection

Bharathidasan University selects candidates for most of the UG and PG courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. For MBA, the university offers admission through TANCET score. CEETA PG score is considered for admission to MTech course of BDU. Besides, PhD admission is also entrance exam. Aspirants selected for PhD are also required to come for an interview round.
STEP 3: Counselling

Once the candidates are selected, they are called for counselling. For MBA and MTech,TANCET CounsellingandCEETA PG Counsellingare done. Aspirants attending university counselling must bring the specified documents for verification. Shortlisted candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

Bharathidasan University fee is a sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, library deposit, training and exam fee, etc. There are a few components that are one-time payable, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. courses_data.description: Bharathidasan University offers Integrated BTech + MTech for six years. All candidates seeking admission to six year integrated MTech course should have studied Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry (MPC) in Class 12 or equivalent qualifying examinations. faqs.question: How are the placements at Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Bharathidasan University placements 2023, a total of 59 UG 3-years and 318 PG 2-years students were placed in reputed companies. Further, the median package offered to UG 3-year and PG 2-year students during Bharathidasan University placements 2023 was INR 1.80 LPA and INR 2.16 LPA, respectively. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Bharathidasan University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Bharathidasan University's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Bharathidasan University fell 6 ranks to #61 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Bharathidasan University's rank is #36, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'State Public University' category have displayed a stable trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Bharathidasan University's rank is #16, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel.description: Bharathidasan University's hostel has a total of 1460 students staying in the hostels. Among them 694 are boys and 766 are girls. There are separately integrated dining halls for boys and girls. The hostel rooms are provided with fans, good lighting, adequate water facility, recreation centre, playing ground, newspapers and magazines. Each hostel is provided with a television and cable connectivity. Similarly, all the hostels have Wi-Fi facility. The hostels are provided with a good hygienic cooking facility and spacious dining halls. There is 24 hours watch and ward for women’s hostels. Each hostel is provided with hot water facility in the bathrooms. The hostels have grievance redressal Committee and purchase committee which meet once in a month. The hostels are provided with a telephone facility to receive calls from outside.

library.description: Bharathidasan University's library is well furnished with all resources including e-library resources. The Library has separate halls for housing the books, journals, magazines and reference books in addition to a big and well-furnished reading hall. In terms of learning resources, the library has a good collection of books and e-books in addition to subscribing a number of journals and audio-video cassettes. The library has INFLIBNET and DELNET facilities. The UGC Infonet facility helps to access more than 10000 e-resources including thousands of e-journals. Through the university's digital library, the students and faculty members can have access to more than 5000 back volumes and 7000 electronic books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Swami Dayananda College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and good environment surrounded by green fields.
reviews.review_text: Basically, the hostel is very good. It has good facilities and a good atmosphere, surrounded by a green environment. Our college hostel guardian is responsible and friendly, which is a plus point. We have good food, a good place to sleep, a good computer lab, a communication lab, and the infrastructure is very good. We also have a multifunctional library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: The college had a library, labs, and good classrooms. I was not a hostel student. I was a day scholar, and it was awesome. I heard from hostel students in my classroom that there were many games and sports, annual day celebrations, fests, and many other activities in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides proper and hygienic hostels. It has a good library, and a digital library is also available. In the case of facilities, everything is top-notch as compared to other colleges around Coimbatore. It also provides free Wi-Fi and digital libraries free of cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for MCA course.
reviews.review_text: More than four computer laboratories, two canteens, and historic buildings are among the many facilities. The canteens’ food is of high quality. Scholarships are available for kids from low-income families, a green and clean environment is maintained, and a free midday meal programme is provided for those in need.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bishop Heber CollegeReviewed on 17 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Bishop Heber College, Social Work Department.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and hostels are average compared to other colleges. The library is very good with an e-library. There is a very good canteen and sports facilities. You can even get a sports scholarship. Free Wi-Fi is available if you have a laptop. There are very good computer labs and other labs, such as a botany lab and labs for visual communication.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 13 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is 7 out of 10, but everything has its own pros and cons, so you’ve to learn how to survive.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of facilities. We can have the respected Wi-Fi, labs, and library time. Recently, our college time has changed, and we are getting a lot of time to explore our campus. The food is great, and we get equal and tasty food on campus at a cheap rate.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 26 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: 180 years old and a heritage college in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities include more than 4 computer labs, 2 canteens, and old and heritage buildings. The quality of food in the canteen is good. Free mid day meals scheme for the financially backward class, Scholarships for financially backward students, and a Green and fresh environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 16 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Moderate satisfied with faculty and absolutely dissatisfied with fee structure.
reviews.review_text: In our department, classrooms are well organised and neat. Wi-Fi is not provided in our department. Library is good. Hostel facility is nice. Food quality is better but weekly two times chicken will be provided in the hostel. College provide more care for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by J.J. College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 6 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Raising their standards to higher.
reviews.review_text: Administration of the college focuses on the goals of the students, and arranges the possible things required for achieving them. Their educational standards are too good. But requires improvement by means of providing proper facilities. But it's one of the underrated colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bishop Heber CollegeReviewed on 2 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The ambiance is too good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the whole college and hostels. It provides good communication. They are giving more importance to sports, NCC, and NSS. There are camps, and field work is more important. There are more than 30 clubs at the college. I truly recommend this college. Canteen is too good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 31 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A Heritage Campus with Strong Academics, Supportive Faculty, and Good Placements.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts the Arrupe Library housing over 160,000 volumes including rare collections and more than 200 print journals. There are also 15+ departmental libraries supporting varied faculty and student needs. A robust IT infrastructure includes the Jerome Centre for ICT multiple computer laboratories (including four dedicated labs with 190 systems at the Ehrhart Centre), 24/7 Wi-Fi, an ICT centre, and language labs. The college offers several boys' hostels (Live's House, New Hostel, Sacred...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan College Of Arts And Science For Women - DSCASWReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements, best faculty members, excellent infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, cafeteria, auditorium, spacious classrooms, playground, Wi-Fi, labs, indoor sports hall, yoga hall, and a beautiful garden. Our college provides a good hostel. The college canteen and mess provide good food. Our college has medical facilities for students and all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for MBA course.
reviews.review_text: Our college ranks among the top institutions in the nation regarding services and facilities. It offers boundless Wi-Fi access across the campus. Its velocity is 200 Mbps. Our college offers amenities such as a library, student accommodation, and more. Our college is equipped with air conditioning. The accommodation is excellent. The student body managers the mess menu, resulting in monthly changes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is the best college. Wi-Fi is supposed to be provided throughout the campus, but it is still not available. The hostel needs to be improved considerably. Institutions around the world have not used the same hostel in the same way for the last 50 years. Rooms should be properly arranged and locked. Overall, some improvements need to be made.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college ever for the M.Sc. In the Chemistry course.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well-structured and is currently being created. Healthcare and athletic facilities are exceptional. You will receive 1 GB of data every day over Wi-Fi, as well as unlimited call services. Even messed-up food tastes good. There are 16 hostels, with 12 designed for boys and 4 for girls. Mandakini is a newly developed hotel that focuses on newcomers this year.

college_info.intro: The flagship programme offered at Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre is an MDS. The college provides this programme to students at the PG level. Apart from the MDS course, the college also offers BDS and Dental Hygienist courses at the UG level. The college offers a two-year MDS programme in Prosthodontics, Orthodontics, Periodontics, Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, Paediatric and Preventive Dentistry, Oral Surgery, Public Health Dentistry, Oral Pathology & Microbiology, and Oral Medicine & Radiology with a comprehensive curriculum. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The mode of admission at Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre is online. KDCRC offers the Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) and Master of Dental Surgery (MDS) programmes. Additionally, they offer a Diploma in Dental Hygienist course. The college also provides training in various specialisations within Dental Medicine, including Oral Surgery, Prosthodontics, Periodontics, Endodontics, and Orthodontics. KDCRC fee structure includes a tuition fee ranging from INR 1.5 lakh to INR 7 lakh, depending on the level and duration of the course. Below mentioned are some of the and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre MDS course is INR 26.2 lakh. Candidates need to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. In case a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the stipulated time, his or her admission stands canceled.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered was 16 LPA. There was no such provision for placements provided, and students earn only Rs. 5,000 per month. The top role offered was as BDS staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was not good. Frequently short circuits happened in the hostel. The food was not good and caused food poisoning and typhoid regularly. Restrooms are not cleaned properly. There were only two restrooms in the lobby. There was no Wi-Fi facility.
review_content.Faculty: The management and professors were not good in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has an awesome infrastructure with the best faculty members and patient flow.

review_content.Placements: In the 2018 batch, about 100% of students were there with full strength having all seats occupied. Most of the students got placements with good and exciting salary packages. About 100% of students did internships at this college itself as it is the best college in the entire state of Uttar Pradesh. Our college offers BDS and MS courses with the best faculty members and patient flow. The role of a dental hygienist is also available here. This is the best ever college. I have seen the best helping faculty members and the best management staff members.

review_summary.college_name: Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Kothiwal Dental College is a good option for those seeking a better future in the medical field.

content.Placements: There is no placement service provided by our college. Being a medical college, they do not offer placements; they only grant degrees, after which you're expected to either practice independently or seek employment. The college offers a one-year internship during which they provide a stipend of 2000rs. During this internship, you directly interact with patients, enhancing your confidence in patient care.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are not up to par in my experience. The lecture halls are old, and there are no air conditioners for the students. The hostels are acceptable, but there are limited rooms for the students. The quality of food is passable, but not great. There is a general hospital available 24/7 in case you fall ill.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college and infrastructure but little unsatisfied with canteen.

content.Placements: 103 students batch out of which 67 are doing MS from very much reputed colleges. As it is a BDS course, no placements are there. No companies come but you can open your own clinic. After internship only you will be able to open your own clinic.
content.Infrastructure: Very nice architecture of college and high level of learning and teaching staffs is also very nice with high patient flow. Every year, college organize year wise match for many sports. We also had a cultural fest. Canteen is also available with the mess facilities. Other than dental OPD other medical multi-specialty hospital is also there.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre.

content.Placements: The salary package offered was 16 LPA. There was no such provision for placements provided, and students earn only Rs. 5,000 per month. The top role offered was as BDS staff.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was not good. Frequently short circuits happened in the hostel. The food was not good and caused food poisoning and typhoid regularly. Restrooms are not cleaned properly. There were only two restrooms in the lobby. There was no Wi-Fi facility.
content.Faculty: The management and professors were not good in our college.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has an awesome infrastructure with the best faculty members and patient flow.

content.Placements: In the 2018 batch, about 100% of students were there with full strength having all seats occupied. Most of the students got placements with good and exciting salary packages. About 100% of students did internships at this college itself as it is the best college in the entire state of Uttar Pradesh. Our college offers BDS and MS courses with the best faculty members and patient flow. The role of a dental hygienist is also available here. This is the best ever college. I have seen the best helping faculty members and the best management staff members.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: One of the best private dental college.

content.Placements: The college tries to provides us with good placement. The practicing period during the academic years gives a fine working experience to the students which helps them in gaining a good medical professional job and further students can practice in their own dental setup.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good and clean. The hostel rooms are wide and spacious. Mess serves tasty and delicious food with all safty measures and hygiene. Classrooms and library are nice and clean with projectors included for a better learning experience. Extracurricular activities includes all type of cultural and sports activities.

admission_process.title: Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centreadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers BDS and MDS courses at the UG and PG level. The institute also offers a Dental Hygienists course besides the UG and PG courses. The selection criteria are completely based on the national-level entrance exam score for the UG and PG courses. For UG and PG courses, candidates are selected based on the NEET entrance exam scores, respectively. To get admitted to KDCRC, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at theKothiwal Dental College and Research Centreis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutKothiwal Dental College and Research Centrecourse admission2025.

Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre course admissionfor the Engineering course is entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the institute must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forKothiwal Dental College and Research Centre courses:

Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://kothiwaldentalcollege.com/appointment.html. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute admits students based onNEET+ Counselling for the BDS course. Students who are looking for MDS admission must have a valid NEET MDS entrance exam score. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theKothiwal Dental College and Research Centre feeto confirm their seats at the institute.
