reviews.review_heading: Kothiwal Dental College is a good option for those seeking a better future in the medical field.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are not up to par in my experience. The lecture halls are old, and there are no air conditioners for the students. The hostels are acceptable, but there are limited rooms for the students. The quality of food is passable, but not great. There is a general hospital available 24/7 in case you fall ill.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and infrastructure but little unsatisfied with canteen.
reviews.review_text:
Very nice architecture of college and high level of learning and teaching staffs is also very nice with high patient flow. Every year, college organize year wise match for many sports. We also had a cultural fest. Canteen is also available with the mess facilities.
Other than dental OPD other medical multi-specialty hospital is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kothiwal Dental College and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was not good. Frequently short circuits happened in the hostel. The food was not good and caused food poisoning and typhoid regularly. Restrooms are not cleaned properly. There were only two restrooms in the lobby. There was no Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has an awesome infrastructure with the best faculty members and patient flow.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome in our college. Labs and classrooms are air-conditioned and have the best projection devices and seats. The library is also very near and clean with a silent environment to study and focus on studies. Food served in the mess and canteen is better than other colleges of India. Medical facilities offered are good. All emergency treatments are available 24x7. Sports majorly played and enjoyed here are basketball, football, cricket, volleyball, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best private dental college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good and clean. The hostel rooms are wide and spacious. Mess serves tasty and delicious food with all safty measures and hygiene. Classrooms and library are nice and clean with projectors included for a better learning experience. Extracurricular activities includes all type of cultural and sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best dental college in Rohilkhand.
reviews.review_text: The library and classrooms are good here. Wi-Fi facility is available, and the labs are well maintained. Our college has a good location and is safe and has clean rooms. Helpful and friendly staff members available in the college. The quality of the food served in the mess is good. It serves excellent and tasty food, and their service is good. 24 hours of electricity and water supply are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best dental college in Moradabad. Campus surroundings are nice.
reviews.review_text: Library and classrooms are good. Food at the canteen is average. Mess food is also average, there is no wi-fi. Labs are mostly okay and well maintained. Classrooms are spacious and well lit. Library is great, there is also an IT cntre attached with the library.

reviews.review_heading: Not completely satisfied with the college. There is no facility for the jobs or campus placement.
reviews.review_text: All the department in the college are equipped with instruments and machines needed. Infrastructure is not so good but is average. There is no such facility like Wi-Fi neither in college nor in hostel. Food available in mess and in canteen is below average.

reviews.review_heading: The college's review is mediocre.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, as the environment is very peaceful and perfect for studying. The hostel is good as we have our personal restroom and bathroom attached, but Wi-Fi is not provided, and also the food is eatable but still there are sometimes living organisms in the food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studious students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good. There are more than 20 dental chairs in every department. Every department is clean and spacious. Classrooms have no air-conditioners but have fans. There is no good ventilation and no Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are clean and small. Food is fine.

reviews.review_heading: The course curriculum is relevant and infrastructure is the best.
reviews.review_text: This is one of the best dental colleges in the state in terms of providing good facilities. The hostel includes a mess facility within the hostel with all the safety and hygienic measures provided with proper arrangements. The rooms are spacious and are available as per the requirement of the students. Labs and classrooms are properly managed by the attendees providing a marvelous environment for studying. The college includes its own medical hospital with the best doctors in the OPDs and a 24*7...

reviews.review_heading: Extremely happy to be a part of this college.
reviews.review_text: Medical facilities are available 24*7. Separate Hostel for boys and girls. Food quality is good and hygiene is maintained. Lecture halls are well spacious, air conditioned with all the modern equipments required for teaching along with separate conference rooms. The college has a common central library and departmental libraries. Labs are well-equipped with all facilities for pre clinical works. Canteen is available within the campus. Students can actively participate in various sports and cultu...

highlights.summary:
Saveetha Amaravati University was established in 2017. It is recognised by Government of Andhra Pradesh with Gazette Notification Act No.18 of 2018. It is one of India's Leading Education Machineries, and the largest Specialist Centre for Education of all disciplines like Medicine, Dental Surgery, Engineering, Physiotherapy, Nursing, Management, Law, Architecture, Physical Education and Pharmacy.

At present the university is focusing on offering courses in Physiotherapy, Occupational therapy, Allied Health Sciences and Diploma courses in the emerging areas. The university has a College of Physiotherapy, College of Occupational Therapy and School of Medical Sciences.

The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    At Deccan School of Pharmacy median salary for Pharm.D course is INR 2.6 LPA. Also Deccan School of Pharmacy has earned a remarkable review rating of 3.9 based on student feedback. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 3.5 for Placements.
faqs.question: How much median salary is offered for Pharm.D course by Deccan School of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    Deccan School of Pharmacy offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 2.2 LPA to B.Pharma students.
faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Deccan School of Pharmacy to B.Pharma students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Deccan School of Pharmacy offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Pharma. The Deccan School of Pharmacy course fee ranges between INR 2,40,000 to 4,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Deccan School of Pharmacy is approximately INR 240000 - INR 450000.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Deccan School of Pharmacy?

review_content.Placements: I’m from the batch 2019-23 B.Pharma. None of my batch mates ot my seniors got placed in any of the pharmaceutical companies. There is a placements department just for the name sake. After passing out, the faculty just forwards job links and walk-in addresses on the WhatsApp group. They provided an industrial training of just one day. They took an amount from students and gave internship experience certificates. Do not expect any job assistance or placements from Deccan School of Pharmacy.
review_content.Infrastructure: As it is a campus situated near a political party’s headquarter, there is no canteen, no play area or play courts. Everyday there’s a chaos for vehicle parking. No student is allowed to stand or roam around in the ground. The college building is spacious no doubt. But all the classrooms and labs are on the side of the busy main road which is full of traffic buzz and honking noise. You will find it difficult to hear what the faculty is teaching or saying. The classrooms are dull and low lighted. Wi-Fi is available in the library. The Library is vast and spacious. There is no hostel facility and no lift for the students. The college has no medical facility, sports or games in the campus. Sports week and annual day are held in Owaisi Hospital and Research Centre’s campus. No inter-college competitions are held.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I like its infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: I am still studying here, so I don't know more about placements. Our seniors told us that the average salary offered in our course was Rs. 75,000 per month. This depends on your marks and hard work. We are mostly asked to go for higher studies for better opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is huge and spacious. The ground floor and 1st floor of our building belong to hospital management, and the remaining 5 floors belong to the pharmacy. The third floor is filled with functioning labs. We have a library on the 5th floor, which contains all the books related to pharmacy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The teachers are qualified, knowledgeable and the quality of education is pretty good

review_content.Placements: We had to search for jobs, no placements for Pharma.D are provided. For pharmacy, they provide the campus placements and for pharm.D. They have two big teaching hospitals in the heart of the city. 2.0-4.5 LPA is package range offered in out course. Sanofi, GSK and Abott are the top recruiting companies. Pharmacovigilance and Clinical pharmacist are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is average, there is an annual sports week held at owaisi group of institutions and it is pretty interesting. It would be enjoying as other colleges lack in it as the college is in the heart of the city you will save abundant time to and discover the city and create memories.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Ethiraj College for Women (Ethiraj) offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from streams like Business & Management Studies, Science and Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Sc., BCA and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The Ethiraj College for Women (Ethiraj) course fee ranges between INR 16,516 to 2,41,000.

review_content.General: The auditorium is the only good facility at Ethiraj; beyond that, the infrastructure is quite average, and not all restrooms are neat and clean. Only a few buildings are well maintained, while many are in poor condition. I have friends who lived in the hostel for three years and experienced the terrible conditions firsthand. I wouldn't recommend anyone stay at Ethiraj Hostel. There are many good private hostels nearby that are a better choice. One can choose them instead of staying in the Ethiraj hostel just for the low fee and get sick and spend all your money in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied studying in this college with such good educational facilities, safety, and events.

review_content.Placements: Under UG, about 50% of students got placed from my college and some chose to pursue a post-graduation degree. The highest package is about Rs. 75,000 and the lowest package is about Rs. 20,000. The average package is about Rs. 50,000. Wipro, TCS, and Accenture are top companies where students got internships through course. Top roles offered are HR, management roles, code developer, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. We have classrooms with two big windows for less suffocation, proper tables, chairs, proper fans, and light. We even have our own department's computer laboratory. The variety of food in canteen is less, but it's cooked with quality. My college is well known for its events, culture, and sports. Hostel rooms and pretty good too. We have Apollo Shine on our campus for medical emergencies.

Roles like air ticketing executive, air hostess, telecaller, office assistant, visa officer, and passport officer are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi, good classrooms and a library with many types of books. Canteen food is good and affordable with neat maintenance and ambience. review_summary.college_name: Ethiraj College for Women (Ethiraj) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college I have ever seen.

content.Placements: Recruitment at this college is good and above average. Most of the students get placements in good companies, but about 70% of students are placed here. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Times of India, TCS, etc. The highest salary offered is 12 LPA, and the average salary offered is 7 LPA. Top roles offered are expert, journalism, and more.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offers wonderful amenities. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned and well-maintained. The Wi-Fi in the hostels is not great, but the library is wonderful. Hostels are clean and well-kept. When a student becomes ill, the hostel staff is caring and supportive. Smart classroom furniture is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The best arts and science college for culturals and exposure.

content.Placements: Around 70% of the students were placed in my course and batch. The highest package was 10LPA, the average was 4LPA, and the lowest package offered in 2025 was 2-3 LPA. About 40% of the students secured internships in TCS, Dellillote, Accenture, and Cognizant through the Mathematics course. The most common role offered in my course was as a Data Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The auditorium is the only good facility at Ethiraj; beyond that, the infrastructure is quite average, and not all restrooms are neat and clean. Only a few buildings are well maintained, while many are in poor condition. I have friends who lived in the hostel for three years and experienced the terrible conditions firsthand. I wouldn't recommend anyone stay at Ethiraj Hostel. There are many good private hostels nearby that are a better choice. One can choose them instead of staying in the Ethiraj hostel just for the low fee and get sick and spend all your money in the hostel.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied studying in this college with such good educational facilities, safety, and events.

content.Placements: Under UG, about 50% of students got placed from my college and some chose to pursue a post-graduation degree. The highest package is about Rs. 75,000 and the lowest package is about Rs. 20,000. The average package is about Rs. 50,000. Wipro, TCS, and Accenture are top companies where students got internships through course. Top roles offered are HR, management roles, code developer, and more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. We have classrooms with two big windows for less suffocation, proper tables, chairs, proper fans, and light. We even have our own department's computer laboratory. The variety of food in canteen is less, but it's cooked with quality. My college is well known for its events, culture, and sports. Hostel rooms and pretty good too. We have Apollo Shine on our campus for medical emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges with very kind faculty members and a lot.

content.Placements: We literature students get the opportunity to learn to pen down our thoughts using different genres and language styles. More than 65% of students got placed in our college. Our college invites companies like Google, TCS, Wipro, HCL, RBS, and CTS to our campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. It gives us the school vibes. Staff take us to the library and let us read a lot of books to increase our vocabulary skills. They teach communication skills and public speaking skills for us to overcome our stage fear. I've never been to our college hostel but the food they provide is good and hygienic. They give us opportunities in sports like basketball, volleyball, badminton, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Ethiraj College for Women (Ethiraj) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers wonderful amenities. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned and well-maintained. The Wi-Fi in the hostels is not great, but the library is wonderful. Hostels are clean and well-kept. When a student becomes ill, the hostel staff is caring and supportive. Smart classroom furniture is available.

reviews.review_heading: The best arts and science college for culturals and exposure.
reviews.review_text: The auditorium is the only good facility at Ethiraj; beyond that, the infrastructure is quite average, and not all restrooms are neat and clean. Only a few buildings are well maintained, while many are in poor condition. I have friends who lived in the hostel for three years and experienced the terrible conditions firsthand. I wouldn't recommend anyone stay at Ethiraj Hostel. There are many good private hostels nearby that are a better choice. One can choose them instead of staying in the Ethira...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied studying in this college with such good educational facilities, safety, and events.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. We have classrooms with two big windows for less suffocation, proper tables, chairs, proper fans, and light. We even have our own department's computer laboratory. The variety of food in canteen is less, but it's cooked with quality. My college is well known for its events, culture, and sports. Hostel rooms and pretty good too. We have Apollo Shine on our campus for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: It is very good to study and work in a high industry.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, good classrooms and a library with many types of books. Canteen food is good and affordable with neat maintenance and ambience. It provides chapati, poori, chat items, samosas, and puffs. The mess provides daily menu meals with papads. My college provides free noon meals for many students.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges with very kind faculty members and a lot.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. It gives us the school vibes. Staff take us to the library and let us read a lot of books to increase our vocabulary skills. They teach communication skills and public speaking skills for us to overcome our stage fear. I've never been to our college hostel but the food they provide is good and hygienic. They give us opportunities in sports like basketball, volleyball, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: When you join the college, don't be an introvert, as it won't take you anywhere.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facilities on campus. Classrooms are very modern as they use smart boards and projectors to take classes. The library has many books, both fictional and non-fictional. Fiction is my favorite. I always read books from my college library.

reviews.review_heading: Is Ethiraj for you? Get inside scoop!
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities for the students, and the network is poor in most areas of the campus. The hostel is not very good but still works for the amount that they charge. Sports students have a separate hostel and have the best facilities provided to them. The college has a medical facility that operates within the college hours.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good management.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided in our college. The facilities of the hostel are better, but sometimes the Wi-Fi doesn't work properly. The infrastructure of the department is quite good, and the library is nice; there are 3 floors in the library. The quality of the mess is good, but sometimes the food at dinner time is not so good. The quality of food in the canteen is good but costly.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and nice placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department are decent, with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library providing almost all the basic needs. The facilities in the hostel are nice, considering its rooms and every facility of the mess, too. But there is one problem: the hostel fees are high at our college. However, the college is near the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of 2024 batch B.Com.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good. The washrooms are very clean and neat. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is very good, and the faculty are well educated. My college gives equal importance to studies and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, and good facilities are available in our college. They provide food in both the college and hostel, cultural events are performed, and sports and games are conducted every semester. A medical kit is available in our college, and the mess is very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Poor facilities are there in our college.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure is available and poor facilities are provided by our college. They provide limited access to Wi-Fi, a library is available, and labs are provided with old equipment. The food quality of the hostel is poor, the mess is hygienic, a medical box is available, and sports and events are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: They've got a library, labs, classrooms, projectors, Wi-Fi connections, canteens, etc. I was a day scholar but I know a little bit about the hostels. The food was moderate and also a mess for the hostels. The college has medical facilities like a first-aid and sick room and one doctor will be there. They prioritize sports and games for the students and encourage them to participate in them.

reviews.review_heading: Ethiraj is the top most college in our country for women.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. Wi-Fi is provided on campus, and classrooms are spacious with many facilities, such as smart boards and projectors, along with great seating capacity. The library is very well-known here. The washrooms are attached to the hostel rooms, and the rooms are well-furnished and free for students in need. The canteen provides healthy food and maintains hygiene. Medical facilities are also available for students. Sports facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Proudly says it's the Best college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is awesome. Wi-Fi is provided very well, and classrooms are clean with many facilities needed for smooth learning. Libraries are also very helpful. Washrooms are clean, and hostels are well-maintained and free for needy students. The canteen provides affordable food and maintains great hygiene. Medical facilities are available for students, and sports facilities are also excellent.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Homoeopathic Medical College, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BHMS. Whereas, at PG level, Homoeopathic Medical College, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers courses such as MD. Homoeopathic Medical College, Bharati Vidyapeeth fee structure for all the courses is around INR 6,55,050 to 12,65,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are very helpful and has modern infrastructure

review_content.Placements: I have joined for the course BHMS recently so I have no idea about packages and all. Our society is moving towards the homoeopathy recently. Many medical students gets the opportunity to work in the Bharati hospital itself and some of the student are recruited by the other hospitals. 100% students get internship from our university.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are much modernized and very spacious, it can accomodate 125 students at a time. Wi-Fi has good speed, students utilize this Wi-Fi service for study purpose. Labs are well maintained with all the necessary equipment. College canteen has good quality of food. Due to the covid situation the sports are not yet started.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, campus and facilities .

review_content.Placements: In one class, 100 students are present. Rotatory internship is compulsory for all students after the completion of the 4.5-year BHMS course. Students receive offers from homoeopathic companies or hospitals after completing all course requirements, including the internship. The college is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there are some things that need improvement. Wi-Fi facility is provided for all classrooms and labs. A library is also present. The library is not that big, but every book you need is available. The library also has a Wi-Fi facility.

review_summary.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth Homoeopathic Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good educational quality provided.

content.Placements: Placement is very good, about 90% of students were placed. The package starts from 5 lakh per annum. We were offered internships in government medical colleges, which was very good for practical experience. We were posted at PHC for more experience. Very successful doctors are there to teach us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, there are laboratories for each subject, and all the specimens are well-maintained. All the staff is very well-educated, so we get a lot of knowledge from them. Hostel rooms are maintained well and are very clean. Hostel food is also good, and all nutrients are included in the meals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are very helpful and has modern infrastructure

content.Placements: I have joined for the course BHMS recently so I have no idea about packages and all. Our society is moving towards the homoeopathy recently. Many medical students gets the opportunity to work in the Bharati hospital itself and some of the student are recruited by the other hospitals. 100% students get internship from our university.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are much modernized and very spacious, it can accomodate 125 students at a time. Wi-Fi has good speed, students utilize this Wi-Fi service for study purpose. Labs are well maintained with all the necessary equipment. College canteen has good quality of food. Due to the covid situation the sports are not yet started.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college, campus and facilities .

content.Placements: In one class, 100 students are present. Rotatory internship is compulsory for all students after the completion of the 4.5-year BHMS course. Students receive offers from homoeopathic companies or hospitals after completing all course requirements, including the internship. The college is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there are some things that need improvement. Wi-Fi facility is provided for all classrooms and labs. A library is also present. The library is not that big, but every book you need is available. The library also has a Wi-Fi facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend, but keep these things in mind.

content.Placements: Per batch, there are approximately 100 students. Since I'm in 2nd year, I'm not quite sure about the package or the placement. Through this course, we are only promised a degree. After the course, 6-month internships are compulsory in our own hospital before degree.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs lack a few instruments, but overall it's good and hygienic. The classrooms are well-ventilated and well-maintained and smart board is provided in each classroom. The washrooms are also quite hygienic. I'm a localite so I don't know much about hostel facilities.

Bansal College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Bansal College of Pharmacy was founded in 2003. It is a private institute and is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Bansal College of Pharmacy courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. Bansal College of Pharmacy offers a total of 3 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Pharma and M.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 130. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Pharmaceutical and Pharmacognosy. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 62,000 to 78,000. Apart from this, the Bansal College of Pharmacy campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

placements.overview: Bansal College of Pharmacy was founded in 2003. It is a private institute and is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Bansal College of Pharmacy courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. Bansal College of Pharmacy offers a total of 3 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Pharma and M.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 130. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Pharmaceutical and Pharmacognosy. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 62,000 to 78,000. Apart from this, the Bansal College of Pharmacy campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Top college of central India.

review_content.Placements: The maximum package last year was 8 lacs, and the minimum was 3 lacs. And almost all students get placed, approx. 90%, but with a low package. The top role obviously is pharmacist. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom is well-managed, and the library has more than 60k books, and every day there is a laboratory period and daily basis labor happening in the lab. Chemicals are much more than in other colleges. With authorization from PCI College, it brings chemicals that are banned also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 120 students get placements in our college. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. All the students get placed in companies like Alkem, Lupin Medical Care, and all the big companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab classes are conducted regularly where all the students perform practicals. All the instruments and chemicals are available in our college. Labs are always open for students. The hostel facility is very good. It provides two beds in a room and serves good quality food for lunch and dinner. Students can also bring their lunch boxes to the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I am satisfied with the placement record.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students were placed by this year with the highest salary package of 18 LPA and the average salary package of 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters for our course are Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Zydus Cadila, Cipla, Lupin, Sun Pharmaceuticals, Intas Pharma, Novartis, Torrent Pharmaceuticals, etc. Almost 60% of students got internships in the above-mentioned companies. Many roles like pathological lab scientist, pharmacist, health inspector, drug technician, etc., are offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure includes almost every facility which is needed. There are smart classrooms, many medical labs, chemical laboratories and a well-stocked library with a Wi-Fi connection all around. There is a very well managed canteen which provides us with quality food. Many playgrounds and courts for different sports are available like football, basketball, cricket, badminton, etc. There are also very good medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for the pharmacy course.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed but at a very low salary package. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Companies like Bharat Biotech, Sun Pharmaceutical, Glenmark, Lupin, Sushima, Advantmed, etc., visit our college for placements. None of the students from our course got an internship in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available, and there is a poor connection network in college. Labs are good, but there is no sitting arrangement. In the labs, we have to stand in the whole time period of class. We get tired to stand for 3 hours without fans. There are no fans in the labs. Classrooms are good because atleast there they provide fans. The hostel facility is also provided to us. The hostel facility is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bansal College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Students are mostly placed in Cipla or TCS. A variety of companies visit here every year for placements, and the best students are definitely placed. The college invites the companies for the selection of students, and the company from Sikkim also visit the campus where the scope of pharma companies is very huge. It also offers a good salary package as a fresher.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is built in a huge area, which includes the lecture halls, seminar room, auditorium, labs, and a cricket ground. The college provides the best labs. There are different types of labs built for different subjects. The campus is eco-friendly which offers the best atmosphere.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Partially satisfied with the faculties because of their connection with the students.

review_content.Placements: About 92% of the students were placed with an average pack in maximum students but few got good offers from good companies, and about 5% of the students get internship from our courses in differrent companies like cipla, etc and the major of the students get bench jobs for the first few months.
review_content.Infrastructure: All infrastructures were quite good, there are some facilities were available where as some are not like the wifi l, according to college there qas an free wifi but according to us there wasn't, labs are fully facilated specially organic chemistry labs and the classrooms were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Top college of central India.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is well-managed, and the library has more than 60k books, and every day there is a laboratory period and daily basis labor happening in the lab. Chemicals are much more than in other colleges. With authorization from PCI College, it brings chemicals that are banned also.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Lab classes are conducted regularly where all the students perform practicals. All the instruments and chemicals are available in our college. Labs are always open for students. The hostel facility is very good. It provides two beds in a room and serves good quality food for lunch and dinner. Students can also bring their lunch boxes to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am satisfied with the placement record.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure includes almost every facility which is needed. There are smart classrooms, many medical labs, chemical laboratories and a well-stocked library with a Wi-Fi connection all around. There is a very well managed canteen which provides us with quality food. Many playgrounds and courts for different sports are available like football, basketball, cricket, badminton, etc. There are also very good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the pharmacy course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available, and there is a poor connection network in college. Labs are good, but there is no sitting arrangement. In the labs, we have to stand in the whole time period of class. We get tired to stand for 3 hours without fans. There are no fans in the labs. Classrooms are good because atleast there they provide fans. The hostel facility is also provided to us. The hostel facility is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bansal College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college is built in a huge area, which includes the lecture halls, seminar room, auditorium, labs, and a cricket ground. The college provides the best labs. There are different types of labs built for different subjects. The campus is eco-friendly which offers the best atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied with the faculties because of their connection with the students.
reviews.review_text: All infrastructures were quite good, there are some facilities were available where as some are not like the wifi l, according to college there qas an free wifi but according to us there wasn't, labs are fully facilated specially organic chemistry labs and the classrooms were also good.

reviews.review_heading: In 2015, 85% students are selected in campus for placements.
reviews.review_text:
A big library,10 practical labs, one chemical storeroom, free Wi-Fi, one computer lab ,8 classrooms are available in the college.
Quality of food in my hostel is very good. 4 days a week, labs classes are conducted. Hostel provides 4 times food in a day and Sunday special. In my hostel, events are also celebrated. Cleanliness is there in the college. The cleaning staff is regular. Two purifiers are available, and one geyser is available for winter.

The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for MIET Meerut admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Meerut Institute of Engineering & Technology comprises more than 15 departments, including Information Technology, Management Studies, Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, and others. The institute offers UG and PG courses across various streams. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the institute.
MIET Meerut offers full-time, four-year BTech programmes at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of CSE, Biotechnology, Electronics & Communication, Civil, Information Technology, Chemical, Electrical, and others. Below mentioned are the Meerut Institute of Engineering & Technology popular programmes:

student_insights.feedback: Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology offers 28 courses, including undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The duration of BTech and BPharma is four years each. Other UG courses like BSc and BVoc are of three-year duration. At the PG level, the institute offers MBA, MSc, MPharma, MTech, MSc, and other courses offered to the students. BPharma is a two-year programme. The table below lists the popular MIET courses along with their specialisations and MIET Meerut fee details:

To secure the BSc seats, candidates must complete a step-wise admission procedure which mainly includes the application process, selection process, and counselling. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A student shares the true reality of colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placements at our college are not very good, they are below average. They try hard, but only one or two core companies come, and that too only sometimes. Other than this, only small companies come to pick students for work like data entry and other labor-intensive jobs. If you don't get a job, they give you a placement in the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really bad. Even the faculty don't have air conditioning in the summer, let alone the students. The mess is okay, but the classes and buildings are really old and need to be furnished. There are cracks, and there is no air conditioning in the labs. The places that are good are only there to show outsiders so that they can get admissions and fill their pockets.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good. I suggest students get admission here. It has highly supportive staff.

review_content.Placements: The overall percentage of students who get placed is 100%. It is an ideal number. The highest package is 26 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS and Deloitte hire students. More than 50% of students got internships from the B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering course. The top roles offered are quality engineer and quality assurance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. The courses provided are B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharma. Classrooms are good and clean. Smart classrooms are also available with a projector. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel is good. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available here. 2 times food is available in the mess. Food is provided on time in the mess. Sports like volleyball, football, and basketball are played at the AKTU University.

review_summary.college_name: MIET Meerut Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: MIET College is good for every student.

content.Placements: Almost 80 percent of the students got placed last semester in our CSE branch. The highest package is about 12 LPA, and the minimum package is about 3.3 LPA. Top recruitment companies are TCS, HCL, Deloitte, Samsung, Cognizant, and many other tech companies visit every semester. Almost 60 percent of the students got internships in different streams.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure that our college management is providing are good for every student. Facilities such as free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are all very well maintained. The hostel management also provides all necessary facilities to every student. The mess and canteen food are good for everyone to eat. Medical and health facilities are also very well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College life with memories.

content.Placements: Not all the students were placed, even people who were placed got fired after 1 month. The highest package was of 14 LPA, and the average packages were of 3.7 LPA. The top recruiting companies were TCS, Deloitte, HCL, Accenture, Capgemini, and Cognizant, and some small start-ups.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but not maintained, they paint the wall, nothing more they do. The classrooms were big and had all the facilities. The quality of food was average, and the hostel was also not that good-looking. The college provides bus services as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A student shares the true reality of colleges.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are not very good, they are below average. They try hard, but only one or two core companies come, and that too only sometimes. Other than this, only small companies come to pick students for work like data entry and other labor-intensive jobs. If you don't get a job, they give you a placement in the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really bad. Even the faculty don't have air conditioning in the summer, let alone the students. The mess is okay, but the classes and buildings are really old and need to be furnished. There are cracks, and there is no air conditioning in the labs. The places that are good are only there to show outsiders so that they can get admissions and fill their pockets.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. I suggest students get admission here. It has highly supportive staff.

content.Placements: The overall percentage of students who get placed is 100%. It is an ideal number. The highest package is 26 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS and Deloitte hire students. More than 50% of students got internships from the B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering course. The top roles offered are quality engineer and quality assurance.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. The courses provided are B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharma. Classrooms are good and clean. Smart classrooms are also available with a projector. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel is good. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available here. 2 times food is available in the mess. Food is provided on time in the mess. Sports like volleyball, football, and basketball are played at the AKTU University.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology review.

content.Placements: College has a good placement track record, and some of the best companies like TCS, Bosch, Wipro, Accenture, Deloitte, and AWS recruit during placements. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest package is 28 LPA. So, overall, it's a nice placement experience. I would advise my juniors to go for this college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our hostel include Wi-Fi, drinking water, lights, fans, and beds. Fully air-conditioned classrooms are available in our college. There is a central library on campus where students can issue books. The quality of the food in the mess is average. We have three canteens on campus, and the fast food is good. We also have a small ground to play different sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.

admission_overview.college_name: MIET Meerut Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Fee, Dates

paragraphs: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is merit and entrance-based. The admissionprocedure comprises merit in the qualifying examination or entrance exam scores. Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology (MIET) offers 28 undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in Engineering & Technology, Applied Science, Pharmacy, Education, Computer Applications, and Management. The institute also offers vocational courses in Engineering and Management. Besides this, it offers additional training to add value to the courses.Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technologyprovides numerous placement opportunities to students in top recruiting companies like Accenture, Genpact, Axis Bank, TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Cognizant Technologies.

Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology offers several UG and PG courses, admission to which is granted based the merit in the qualifying examination and scores in the entrance exam. It accepts the scores of various state and national-level entrance exams like UPSEE, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, and others. The applicants must meet the basic eligibility for the desired courses before applying for the course. The table below lists presents the admission status of popular MIET Meerut courses along with their eligibility and selection details:
Class 12 with 50-55 % aggregate in Science stream
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate in any discipline
BTech/ BE OR MSc in a relevant discipline
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology fees include multiple components such as registration fees, development fee, security fees, etc. Te security fee of INR 5,000 is refundable after the completion of the course. MIET Meerut seats are allotted once the candidate completes the admission process. Find below seats and fees for admission 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates must complete the admission process of MIET Meerut for admission. The admission procedure includes the application process, selection process, and counselling. . Check below the MIET Meerut admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

For some of the courses, candidates need to register at the official websites of JEE Main,CUET UGand CUET PG. For all the other courses, aspirants either need to apply on the official website of MIET Meerut.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Candidates either need to qualify specified entrance exam or fulfil the educational requirements. The university considers CUET,NATA, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. A merit list might be released by the university to announce the names of the shortlisted aspirants.
Step 3: Counselling

Selected candidates are either required to come for MIET Meerut Counselling or respective entrance exam counselling. For courses offered through CUET UG or CUET PG, candidates need to register for counselling on the CUET website of the university. Aspirants need to confirm their seats by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: Can I join Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology directly. There is no such entrance exam specially for getting admission in Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology. The candidate have to pass his 12th with at least 60% in aggregate, and have to go through JEE ( Joint Entrance Examination) for B.Tech. Earlier there was a particular entrance exam called UPTU but now they give admission on the basis of JEE Mains only. Once you clear the cut off then you have to fill counselling form for colleges and according to your score or rank, you will get the college.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MIET in BTech?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology BTech students must have to qualify the JEE Main exam, and the UPTAC Counselling process. Candidates must qualify the eligibilty criteria set by the institute for the desired course. Qualified candidates must visit the official website and apply online for their desired course.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: There are no special entrance for Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology, the selection takes place on the merit based of the exams like for MBA admission the student have to go for CUET-PG and other option like UPCAT is also there for admission then on the basis of merit one can get admission in Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology. The CUET-PG Last Round score (General-All India) for MBA was 22063. JEE Mains scores, followed by UPTAC counseling, determine BTech admissions at Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology (MIET).

placement_data.title: MIET Meerut Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to MIET Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during MIET BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Further, as per the Pharmacy NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during MIET BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 3.22 LPA and INR 2.64 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF 2022 report, a total of 607 UG and 100 PG students were placed during MIET placements 2021. The median package offered to BTech students was INR 3.60 LPA . For MBA and MPharma courses, the median package stood at INR 3.75 LPA and INR 3.12 LPA, respectively .

faqs.question: Does Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology offer placements?
faqs.answer: Nearly, every student who applied was accepted into the programme. The highest compensation package available was 10 LPA. The base compensation package was 2.4 LPA. The average compensation package was 6.5 LPA. However, according to the NIRF 2022 report, MIET placements in 2021 involved a total of 607 undergraduate and 100 graduate students. The typical salary for BTech students was INR 3.60 LPA. The median compensation for MBA and MPharma programs was INR 3.75 LPA and INR 3.12 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: What is the fees for Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology BTech course?
faqs.answer: The total Course Fee of B.Tech at Meerut Institute of Technology is INR 4.08 Lakhs. B.Tech is a four-year programme in which fees are paid every year. Every year has two semesters. So, there are eight semesters in the programme and the fee of eight semesters is INR 4.08 LPA. The Fee is paid every year which means that the fee of one year for B.Tech is INR 1.2 Lakhs per annum. One year has two semesters. The hostel fee at Meerut Institute of Technology for one year is nearly 50,000 which includes the mess charge, electricity bill, Wi-fi charges, etc.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc Biotechnology at MIET?
faqs.answer: The total fees for MIET Meerut BSc biotechnology is around INR 76, 260. The total fee includes INR 5000 as refundable amount and 1000 as registration fee. Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their seat at the institute. MIET Meerut fee structure might include components other than the tuition fees. The BSc fees are paid every year. There are eight semesters in the programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc course at MIET Meerut?
faqs.answer: The fees for MIET Meerut BSc fee for eight semesters is INR 76,300 - INR 9.7 lakh . Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their seat at the institute. MIET Meerut fee structure might include components other than the tuition fees. The BSc fees are paid every year. There are eight semesters in the programme. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: MIET College is good for every student.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure that our college management is providing are good for every student. Facilities such as free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are all very well maintained. The hostel management also provides all necessary facilities to every student. The mess and canteen food are good for everyone to eat. Medical and health facilities are also very well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College life with memories.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but not maintained, they paint the wall, nothing more they do. The classrooms were big and had all the facilities. The quality of food was average, and the hostel was also not that good-looking. The college provides bus services as well.

reviews.review_heading: A student shares the true reality of colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really bad. Even the faculty don't have air conditioning in the summer, let alone the students. The mess is okay, but the classes and buildings are really old and need to be furnished. There are cracks, and there is no air conditioning in the labs. The places that are good are only there to show outsiders so that they can get admissions and fill their pockets.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. I suggest students get admission here. It has highly supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is good. The courses provided are B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharma. Classrooms are good and clean. Smart classrooms are also available with a projector. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel is good. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available here. 2 times food is available in the mess. Food is provided on time in the mess. Sports like volleyball, football, and basketball are played at the AKTU University.

reviews.review_heading: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our hostel include Wi-Fi, drinking water, lights, fans, and beds. Fully air-conditioned classrooms are available in our college. There is a central library on campus where students can issue books. The quality of the food in the mess is average. We have three canteens on campus, and the fast food is good. We also have a small ground to play different sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good but it could be better and the department infrastructure is also good. Labs, classrooms, and all are good. Sports and games are average but I can be better with good facilities. Labs can be better because of practical purposes. Teachers should be more considerate.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college in Meerut for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is nice. Wi-Fi is also working properly. The lab chair is also comfortable. The library is nice, but classrooms are not perfect. In hostel, there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is nice for engineering in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is better than others. Wi-Fi is also available, and labs are working properly. Chair is comfortable. Library is nice, and classrooms are also perfect in the hostel. There are all facilities like AC and Wi-Fi. Medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate in volleyball, indoor games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: College had a rich and modern infrastructure. The labs were well-equipped with modern types of equipment. At MEIT, there was a vibrant campus with lush green surroundings. All hostel rooms had first aid boxes, air-conditioned rooms, electric water heaters, etc.

reviews.review_heading: M.Tech ECE course admission in the year 2026 at Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college's infrastructure quality is very good and uses high-quality facilities like fast Wi-Fi connection, neat and clean classrooms, bathrooms, many computers in labs, a library, etc. Facilities are available in this college. The college canteen food is not tasty because it uses low-quality materials, and hygienic food is not provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in terms of campus and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old but good. The CSE department has a very big building. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. Lab facilities are good. Classrooms are not very good but average. Good library facilities are available. The canteen food is good, but the hostel mess food is of average quality. A sports ground is available. The civil engineering department also has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college for B.Tech and nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: Nice hostel, AC rooms, and washing machines are also available. An iron is available, nice food is given by them, and all things are done on time. Wi-Fi and internet connection are available throughout the whole college. Classrooms are neat and clean, and electricity is available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Lack of teachers, facility, and focus on assignments. Finally better than other colleges in city.
reviews.review_text: Our college has cheap food and we never go to hostels. Prefer paying guests, and no nutrition in food. The food tastes very bad. No proper things to do and have fun in hostel like other colleges. Nothing for sports so much restrictions and cleanliness is also an issue. There are no proper bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good CSE (AIML) infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and provides good assistance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old but good, especially in CSE with a very large building. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel. The lab facilities and classrooms are average but good. The library facilities are available. The canteen food is good, but the hostel mess food is of average quality. A sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: "College has good CSE infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and industry-ready curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old, but the CSE building is very large. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Lab facilities are good, classrooms are average but decent, and library facilities are available. The canteen food is good, but hostel mess food is of average quality. Sports grounds are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good veterinary college in the heart of Chennai City.

review_content.Placements: As far as the veterinary sector is concerned, it is very rare to get companies for campus recruitment. But MVC and TANUVAS faculty try to get pharmaceutical, poultry, dairy, and animal welfare companies for campus recruitment every year. The veterinary sector has a wide variety of options for placement. The campus offers help for scholarships in both UG and PG levels. For freshers, the highest package was 50k.
review_content.Infrastructure: Madras Veterinary College, Chennai has one of Asia's biggest veterinary libraries. The campus has Wi-Fi, a canteen, and a cooperative store. Every department has a well-furnished laboratory and classroom. The campus was built in the 1800s, and the architecture from the colonial times is still well preserved. Madras Veterinary College Hostel is average. Rooms are small. Hostel food is Tamil cuisine. Food is fine. Hostel rent is reasonable. The hostel has a basketball court, badminton court, table tennis, gym, etc. The hostel offers UPSC training.

overview_faqs.question: Can BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology is a reputed institute for B.Pharma, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology has a review rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. review_summary.college_name: BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology - A good pharmacy college.

content.Placements: Our B. Pharma course placement session starts after completing the 7th semester. Our college offered placements in various leading pharmaceutical companies like Alkem, Torrent, Cipla, Zydus, Glenmark, Mendine, Stassenbarg, etc. Various posts offered were production, QC, QA, and marketing. The average package of our college was around 1.8 LPA - 2.5 LPA. The highest package offered ranges from 3.5 LPA - 4.5 LPA. 40-45% of students choose higher studies and 35% of students got placed in our college. My plan is to go for higher studies after getting my B. Pharma degree.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review for BCDA college of pharmacy and technology .

content.Placements: The percentage of placement is approximately more than 80 percent. But many of the students of this college are pursuing higher study. This college also provides master of pharmacy. The minimum package is approximately 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tornado pharma, Glenmark, Cipla, etc. And many students go to pharmacovigilance.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. This college is quite strong because it is the oldest college in West Bengal. But at this college, the lab and library are very advanced. In the classroom, a projector is available. And teaching and non-teaching staffs are very responsible about their professions .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: BCDA college is one of the best colleges under WBJEE.

content.Placements: Many of students don't appear in on-campus placement; they go for off-campus more or less all of the time. The average package is 204000 per year. Recruiting companies include Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr. Reddy's. Many students had done there internships in various pharmaceutical industries. Marketing and industrial area both came for placement .
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are well experienced, and there are 3–7 doctoral holders in facilities but 4-6 faculty members joined in the current academic year; they do not have that much experience, which is required for giving a lecture at a college. There are no hostels available, but the canteens are reasonably priced.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers, but it does not provide good placements.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placements. Top recruiting companies do not visit our campus.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are not provided. The quality of the food in the mess is good and affordable. Our college provides good infrastructure.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. They are good and friendly. They guide us properly and support us like a friend, but some teachers are very professional and rude. They may not help you properly when you seek assistance from them.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students went for higher studies, and a majority of the rest got placed in various reputed pharma industries like Alkem Lupin Torrent, Cipla etc. Students get placed in various departments like QC, QA, production, marketing etc. The starting package offered is reasonable.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is up to the mark. The classrooms, laboratories and library are well-equipped. There is a canteen inside the campus, where you can find food at reasonable prices. The faculty members are very good and are always ready to help you. The college also has free 5G Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with good facilities, faculty members, infrastructure and placements in 2020.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology is quite good. There are a library, classrooms and laboratories. The laboratories and classrooms are very clean and spacious and are comfortable for students. There are sufficient books for students in the library. No Wi-Fi is available in this college. The hostels are good enough for students. A lot of facilities are available. The quality of food in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are available. Annual sports and games ...

reviews.review_heading: Placements were very good in 2016. infrastructure lacks behind, but education is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college building is okay, but I'm not fully satisfied. The labs in our college are good with efficient supply of materials and very helpful lab assistants. Classrooms have audiovisual systems with enough space to accomodate the students comfortably. The canteen provides food and soft drinks at an affordable price. Medical facilities are good, but there is no Wi-Fi in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not so good. With lack of college field. But excellent in placement and education.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are big enough to accomodate all students. With audio visual system. Well equipped lab are tgere with availability of all materials. Library is there with wide variety of books needed for the course. Sick room is there. College conducts many events like fest. Sports. Concert. And celebrations of many festivals.

reviews.review_heading: Bcda college of pharmacy and technology .
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college is very good. They are very helpful and supporting and they help us in our other students activities. Our college campus is a bit small as there are only one course. The classroom, labs are good and Wi-Fi also available. The food of the canteen is quite good and their are many options available. Our college do not have a hostel and there are annual sports and picnics which are organised by college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best pharmacy colleges in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs for the academic subjects with the best faculty members and lab technicians are present. Classrooms have projectors and are large enough, creating a very positive environment. The library has an adequate amount of books and journals related to academics. There is no hostel, but the college canteen is present.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good education provide our college.
reviews.review_text: Our course/department have many labs, labs was good to perform big area and all instrument was present bit all instrment was not good. Our college have good library and classroom. Our college hostel quality and facility was not very good it is average.

reviews.review_heading: I satisfied of our college because of our college faculty members was good
reviews.review_text: The college hostel comes under a paying guest facilily. But the owner is very rude and doesn't provide good food also. The food may be good but is contaminated most of the time .  The pg is mainly opposite to narayana multi speciality hospital , barasat .

reviews.review_heading: BCDA College of Pharmacy and Technology is a good career option.
reviews.review_text: They provide us with good facilities. The college offers all-time Wi-Fi access, CCTV cameras, and excellent library facilities. Classrooms are spacious and clean. The college does not have a hostel, but the canteen facilities are very good, and the quality of food is excellent. Medical facilities are also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the better option for all pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is a decent library, and several books are available. Classrooms are well-maintained. Laboratories are decent. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. The food served in the canteen is good. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college to choose, as it's cheaper than others. Very strong placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not available from the college's end. Although, external PGs and rental rooms are ample in the proximity of the college. Talking about infrastructure, it's quite good with experienced and helping professors. But one thing that lags behind is Wi-Fi connection which is generally not accessible by students.

reviews_list.review_title: I am fully satisfied with my college because of the excellent faculty and internship stipend.

review_content.Placements: BDS and MS are the courses provided in our college. All 100% of students got internships after four years in our dental hospital, and we also have internal quota for Masters in Dental Surgery, making admission easier. The internship stipend is 1 lakh for each three-month period.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of food in the mess is good, and there are two canteens, a stationary shop, a gym, a game room, a yoga room, and a prayer room in the hostel. The menu in the mess is also excellent, with non-vegetarian options provided thrice a week. There are AC-installed reading rooms for studying and other facilities provided.

reviews_list.review_title: For placement, it can be said which dissatisfied the expectations of the students.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are up to the mark i.e. all the facilities are given such as Wi-fi, classrooms and library. The food of the hostel is not up to the mark. Medical facilities are such a blessing for all of us.
review_content.Faculty: Yes, all of the teachers are well-educated, qualified, and skilled and they have deep knowledge of everything related to this course. Yes, this course is really relevant. Yes, it makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are very good in this college.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Ziauddin Ahmad Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with my college because of the excellent faculty and internship stipend.

content.Placements: BDS and MS are the courses provided in our college. All 100% of students got internships after four years in our dental hospital, and we also have internal quota for Masters in Dental Surgery, making admission easier. The internship stipend is 1 lakh for each three-month period.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food in the mess is good, and there are two canteens, a stationary shop, a gym, a game room, a yoga room, and a prayer room in the hostel. The menu in the mess is also excellent, with non-vegetarian options provided thrice a week. There are AC-installed reading rooms for studying and other facilities provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: For placement, it can be said which dissatisfied the expectations of the students.

content.Placements: 50% placement were placed. The lowest was Rs Rs 10,80,000 and the highest was Rs 1200000/-. 100% of students got internships from this course and in many hospitals like AIIMS.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are up to the mark i.e. all the facilities are given such as Wi-fi, classrooms and library. The food of the hostel is not up to the mark. Medical facilities are such a blessing for all of us.
content.Faculty: Yes, all of the teachers are well-educated, qualified, and skilled and they have deep knowledge of everything related to this course. Yes, this course is really relevant. Yes, it makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are very good in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has a good education system. Clinical skills are taught here.

content.Placements: About 40% of students got placed in our batch. Placements are according to the NEET result. We are recruited by the hospitals for doing an internship. We have to give NEET PG exam to get a seat for postgraduation. We are behaving as interns.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms available and a library. Sports facilities are good. The canteen is poor. Medical facilities are available. Games are also available here. Few functions are organised here. The college and hostel life is good. The library is open for a specific time.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Manipal University are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. These courses are offered to students in full-time mode and in several specialisations. Some of the popular specialisations offered under BTech and MBA are Mechatronics, Aeronautical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources Management, etc.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. MAHE courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. MAHE Manipal offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The university offers these programmes across several specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, International Business, Biotechnology, Marketing, Nursing, Physics, Banking, Business Analytics, Insurance, Mechatronics, and many more.

At the UG level, the Manipal Academy of Higher Studies offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BCA, BDS, BPT, BDes, BArch, and other courses to students. At the PG level, , offers MTech,, MCA, , MS, , MPT, , MCom, , MCh, , MOptom, and other courses to students. The deemed university also offers PhD courses to students.
