reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with facilities.

review_content.Placements: Percentage of the students who were placed in our course was 55%. Highest package was 13 LPA, average package was 7.5 LPA, and lowest package was 4 LPA. Many reputed and big companies reached our college campus for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of average size and are not cleaned daily. Wi-Fi facilities are only available for faculty members. Quality of food available in mess and canteen is very hygienic and tasteless. Hostel rooms are also not comfortable. Limited sports facilities present.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Media and Communication - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with my experience in MIC.

review_content.Placements: Around 70 to 80 percent of students who sit for placements get placed, while the rest usually opt for higher studies, family businesses, freelancing or start ups. The average package range between 4 to 6 LPA, with the highest packages going up to around 10 to 12 LPA in good years, especially for marketing, branding and corporate communication roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with regular cleaning, security and basic facilities. The mess food is average. Sometimes good, sometimes repetitive but there are many food options on and around campus. Medical facilities, sports grounds, gyms and student activity centers are easily accessible and well maintained.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for a four-year UG course of BTech at Manipal University ranges from INR 8.1 lakh- INR 14 lakh. It includes the fee for all BTech specialisations. Those who get direct admission to second year of BTech through Later Entry programme are required to pay between INR 9.42 Lacs - INR 13.48 lakh. However, this fee is taken from the official sources and is subjective. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Manipal University BTech fee.

overview_faqs.question: What is the entrance examination fee for admission to B.A course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?
overview_faqs.answer: For admission to BA in Culinary Arts at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, students require a Manipal Entrance Test (MET) score. The institute conducts this entrance examination for admission to various undergraduate courses offered at Manipal Academy of Higher Education. To appear in MET, candidates are required to pay INR 1400. Entrance examination fees are different from application fees. However, both the application fees and examination fees are non-refundable.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any fee portal at Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Manipal University has an online fee payment portal. The university offers one platform for candidates to check any course fees. Candidates need to visit the official website of Manipal University and click on the fee tab to access the portal. Atudents can choose the courses they want to enroll. It will redirect candidates to course fee structure page.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Manipal University (MAHE)?
overview_faqs.answer: Though fee refund policy of MAHE is based on UGC Refund Policy, however, if students withdraw their application before 15 days of class commencement, full paid hostel fees will be refunded. If student withdraws after class commencement then INR 15000 will be deducted from hostel fee and remaining amount will be returned to student.

review_summary.college_name: Manipal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It has good faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: MSAP placements are existent but limited. It is offered to only the best students of the batch for the Bachelor of Architecture. It has a very active aluminium community that recruits students on behalf of their firms. Out of the selective group of students, a fair number of students do get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch with smartboards for education, highly equipped printing labs, 3d printing labs, VR labs, a library with all the books we need, auditoriums, work studios, a building materials lab, survey labs, good Wi-Fi, and classrooms with plenty of light, air, and charging points. Hostels are well-maintained and standard. There are both AC and non-AC rooms with attached and non-attached bathrooms, from single to triple sharing for female and male, with Wi-Fi. There are staff members for cleaning and laundry services. There are 4-5 types of mess facilities, and we can sign up for them with good, tasty, and hygienic food. Medical facilities are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued Feb(2026) B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Modern infrastructure and growing campus life but placement and facility experience is stabilizing.

content.Placements: Good placements, 80 percent people placed in 2025 placement cycle. The highest package is 69 LPA and average is 12 LPA, the lowest being 3-4 LPA. Top recruiters being Amazon, Microsoft, Bosch, Samsung, Shell. Roles offered included software engineer, data analyst, and consulting analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure and facilities. Classrooms are modern and Wi-Fi enabled with digital teaching aids such as smart-boards, projectors. Clean and well-maintained hostels. There are indoor as well as outdoor sports facilities. There is an on-campus clinic and 2 mess services with decent food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Construction Engineering and Management - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with facilities.

content.Placements: Percentage of the students who were placed in our course was 55%. Highest package was 13 LPA, average package was 7.5 LPA, and lowest package was 4 LPA. Many reputed and big companies reached our college campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of average size and are not cleaned daily. Wi-Fi facilities are only available for faculty members. Quality of food available in mess and canteen is very hygienic and tasteless. Hostel rooms are also not comfortable. Limited sports facilities present.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Media and Communication - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with my experience in MIC.

content.Placements: Around 70 to 80 percent of students who sit for placements get placed, while the rest usually opt for higher studies, family businesses, freelancing or start ups. The average package range between 4 to 6 LPA, with the highest packages going up to around 10 to 12 LPA in good years, especially for marketing, branding and corporate communication roles.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with regular cleaning, security and basic facilities. The mess food is average. Sometimes good, sometimes repetitive but there are many food options on and around campus. Medical facilities, sports grounds, gyms and student activity centers are easily accessible and well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Media and Communication - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best private college.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was extremely good compared to other colleges. Around 85 percent of students were placed in our course. The average package was around 6 LPA. The starting package in our course was a little bit low. The highest package was 12 LPA. 60 percent of students received internship offers. Top recruiting companies were NDTV, Times Now, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good at a private college. Wi-Fi facility, digital classroom, and library facility were present. Hostel quality was also very good. The quality of food was also good. A multiple sports complex was present.

faqs.answer: MAHE (Manipal Academy of Higher Education) offers admission to various UG, PG, Diploma and doctoral-level programmes in the fields of Medicine, Technology, Science, Humanities, Social Science, Management, etc. Admission to a few of the courses is merit-based. For others, the entrance exam such as MET, CAT, XAT, NEET UG, etc., score is considered. The university accepts several national-level entrance exams to shortlist the candidates. Further, the mode of application at Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) is online.
faqs.question: How can I get admission in MAHE Manipal?

faqs.answer: Candidate must qualify in the NEET UG for admission to MBBS at MAHE. There is no criteria for 10th and 12th marks if the NEET UG requirement is satisfied. Candidates must take the NEET UG exam and have the eligibility criteria to appear for the exam.
faqs.question: Can I get into Manipal Academy of Higher Education if I have scored just 60% in 10th and 75% in 12th?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can surely get admission at 12th percentile of 75, as your 10+2 scores doesn't matter in the case of NEET PG admission. The needed criteria which a candidates must follow is to have MBBS degree from an institute recognised by the Medical Council of India (MCI). Such candidates must possess MBBS degree or a Provisional MBBS Pass Certificate at the time of admissions.
faqs.question: Can I get into with 75% in class 12 with NEET PG?

paragraphs: The admission process for MAHE, Manipal is a multi-stage process which consists of application, appearance in the selection rounds and counselling process. Students seeking to enrol in any of the courses offered at the university need to meet the course requirements for Manipal admission before applying. A detailed guide to theManipal University admission processis given below:
1: Manipal University Application Process

The admission process begins with filling out an online application form on the official website of Manipal University. Candidates can apply for the course of their choice along with paying an application fee ofINR 600. Apart from that, to appear for the MET exam, candidates also have to apply for the respective entrance exam and pay an application fee ofINR 1,400.
2: Manipal University Other Selection Rounds

Admission to Manipal University courses is both merit and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, candidates must qualify for either MAHE Manipal entrance exam, i.e., MET or any other national-level entrance exams for the respective courses. Also, there are other selection rounds such as GDPI conducted as part of the selection process. For some courses, the concerned departments also conduct tests at their level. Also, direct admissions are offered to a few courses based on the candidates' merit obtained in the previous qualification. These candidates are shortlisted during the counselling process.
3: Manipal University Counselling Process/ Merit Release

Based on the scores in the respective entrance exams, past academic records and performance of candidates in other selection rounds, the university releases a merit list. Also, for direct admissions, the university conducts a counselling process based on candidates' scores obtained in the last examination.
4: Provisional Admission Notice

After the release of the merit list, a admission notice will be sent to the selected candidates. Later on, candidates can proceed with the other admission formalities such as fee payment and document verification (if required). For more details about the final admission process, candidates check the Manipal University page.

faqs.question: Does Manipal University accept NEET?
faqs.answer: Yes, for admission to MBBS course, the university only accepts a valid score of NEET UG. faqs.question: How much does MBBS at Manipal cost?

faqs.question: What is the cutoff mark for MAHE through the CAT, CMAT, NMAT and XAT for All India category students?
faqs.answer: The Manipal University accepts CAT, CMAT, NMAT, and XAT. Considering theMAHE cutoff 2024, theCAT,CMAT,NMAT,andXATpercentile for the All India category candidates stood between85,95,80, and80, respectively.

faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Manipal University (MAHE)?
faqs.answer: Though fee refund policy of MAHE is based on UGC Refund Policy, however, if students withdraw their application before 15 days of class commencement, full paid hostel fees will be refunded. If student withdraws after class commencement then INR 15000 will be deducted from hostel fee and remaining amount will be returned to student.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admissions to BTech courses at Manipal University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility requirements to get admissions into BTech courses at Manipal University are that candidates must complete their Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics, Mathematics and English as compulsory subjects along with chemistry/biotechnology/biology/any vocational subject as optional. Moreover, the university accepts valid MET scores for admissions to BTech courses. Moreover, the provision of direct admissions has not been mentioned on the official website of the university.

faqs.question: Is MBA available in Manipal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal University provides PG-level course of MBA (General) for a duration of two-years. The university also offers MBA in four other specialisations. These MBA courses are taught at the Department of T A Pai Institute of Management (TAPMI), Manipal. Find below the list of Manipal University MBA specialisations:Banking and Financial ServicesHuman Resource ManagementMarketingInterested candidates can apply forMBAat Manipal University via qualifying any national-level entrance such as CAT, XAT, GMAT, NMAT. Admissions to MBA are also offered to international students.Find here, the detailed Manipal University admission process for MBA course.

faqs.question: What are the key academic programmes offered by Manipal University (MAHE)?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers courses across several fields, such as medical, engineering, science, law, arts, management, commerce, etc. Admission to most of the courses are done on the basis of entrance exam scores, followed by the other selection rounds, such as personal interview. Students can check out the following list to know about the key academic programmes offered at Manipal University:BTechB.ArchBScBHMMBBSBDSBScBComBALLBMTechMSc

faqs.question: Does Manipal University offer direct admission for MBA (without any entrance exam)?
faqs.answer: No, Manipal University does not provide direct admission for MBA. Admission to MBA at Manipal University is completely entrance-based. Aspirants need to qualify for any one of the All India Management entrance exams for admission to MBA course. Candidates can either qualify for CAT/ XAT/ NMAT/ GMAT in order to get admission. Before sitting for the exam, interested candidates have to fill an online application form for the respective entrance exams. Check out the following links for the step-wise application process for CAT & XAT entrance exams:CAT Registration Process 2023XAT Registration Process 2023

faqs.question: What is the Manipal University MET Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: TheManipal University MET Cutoff 2025is out for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff is released in the form of ranks and is valid for admission to various engineering and medical courses at both UG and PG level. For the General AI category, the cutoff for BTech CSE ( AI and ML) course was12751for Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. For the BTech ECE course, the cutoff in 2025 was15046for the same category and college.Please note that the cutoff for each category, round, specialisation will vary.

placement_data.title: Manipal University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to Manipal University ongoing placement drive 2025, The highest international and highest domestic package offered during MIT Manipal placements in 2025 stood at INR 2.19 Crore and INR 57 LPA, respectively. While, the average package stood at INR 12.31 LPA. Up till now the placement rate achieved during the 2025 placements was 77.4%. More than 287 industry giants from various sectors such as, Analytics, Consulting, FMCG, IT, Healthcare, Sales and Marketing, etc, offered a variety of jobs to its students. Manipal University also provides internship opportunities to its students. The highest internship stipend stood at INR 60,000 per month . The top recruiters included Ericsson, EY, Oracle, Flipkart, Adobe, Philips, Adani Group, Amazon, IBM, Samsung, SAP Labs, BOSCH India, Boeing, L&T, Cisco, Cipla, Microsoft , etc.

Higher Education like M.Com, MBA, CA, ICWA, Civil Services etc.

faqs.question: What are the average placements at Manipal University Bangalore?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, the Manipal Institute of Technology average package offered in 2025 stood at INR 12.31 LPA. Further, the Manipal University average package offered to the top 50 students of the batch 2025 of Manipal University stood at INR 30.70 LPA. faqs.question: How much does MBBS at Manipal cost?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers MBBS course for a duration of total five years and six months, out of which, the course is divided into the duration of four years and six months with a one-year compulsory rotatory internship. The tuition fee for MBBS at Manipal University is INR 44 lakh - INR 72.9 lakh, which depends upon the school one chooses to pursue the course from. The given fee is taken from official sources and hence, is subjective. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Manipal University MBBS fee.

description: Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBBS and MDS courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Manipal Academy of Higher Education NEET UG cutoff 2025, along with other exams across various courses, rounds, and categories.

MAHE offers MBBS admission via its affiliated college called KMC Manipal. The institute accepts the NEET UG exam, followed by its counselling rounds for Kasturba Medical College admission to its MBBS course. During the KMC Manipal NEET UG cutoff 2025, the last-round closing rank for the MBBS course was 31834 for the General AI category students. Similarly, the first-round closing rank for the same course stood at 40008. Below are the NEET UG first and last-round closing ranks for the students be

According to Manipal University MBBS cutoff 2025, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 31834 for the General AI category students. The cutoff was 36053 in 2024 for the same course, while in 2023, it was 24330. After, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, the MBBS course of KMC Manipal, affiliated with Manipal University, saw instability in its last-round closing ranks. To learn more about the rounds and category-wise Manipal cut off trends, use the filters provided below:

Manipal University accepts NEET UG ranks via KMC Manipal for admission to the MBBS courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG counselling dates for admission to Kasturba Medical College, Manipal, Manipal Academy of Higher Education.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the year-wise NEET UG cutoff lists for admission to the MBBS course at Kasturba Medical College, Manipal, Manipal Academy of Higher Education.

Manipal University accepts several national-level entrance exams for admission to its MBA programmes. The University accepts CAT, XAT, CMAT and NMAT entrance exams for admission. Manipal University MBA cutoff 2024 will be released soon based on candidates' performance in the national-level entrance exams. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the previous years' cutoff percentage for CAT along with other exams. During the 2023 cutoff, the MBA CAT percentile for TAPMI M

Candidates can refer to the table below to check out some of the important exam dates for CAT, XAT, MAT and NMAT, among others for Manipal University admission to the MBA courses via its affiliated colleges.
Students can check out the table below to view or download the exam-wise MBA cutoff ranks for previous years to get an idea of the cutoff trends for MBA admission.

Admission to Manipal University for MD and MS courses is done via the NEET PG examination, followed by Karnataka NEET PG counselling process. As per the Manipal University NEET PG Cutoff 2025, which was released for General category candidates under the All India quota, the cutoff in the last round closing ranks ranged from 4555 to 134480 for admission at Kasturba Medical College, Manipal.

The Manipal University NEET PG Cutoff 2025 has been released for Round 2 for the General AI category candidates waiting to enrol to the MD and MS courses. According to the General AI category candidates cutoff in 2025, the hardest course was MD in Radiodiagnosis, with a cutoff of 4555. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course and category was 4891, and in 2023, it was 5534. After analysing the cutoff for the same, we can say that the competition for this course has been increasing over the years.

Manipal University NEET PG Counselling 2025 is ongoing to admission to MD and MS course specialisations. The results have been announced till Round 2 for the General AI category candidates. Students can check out the table below to know the previous years and rounds cutoff list for 2023, 2024, and 2025.

Manipal University NEET SS Cutoff 2025 will be available after the results get declared. Until then, students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for 2024 and 2023 for the General category candidates under the All India quota for Round 3. The cutoff in 2024 ranged from 21 to 6872 rank, wherein MCh in Hand Surgery was the toughest course for admission for the aforementioned category.

Manipal University DM/MCh Cutoff 2025 will be released soon. In the meantime, students can check the table below to know the cutoff ranks for 2024 and 2023 for the General AI category candidates. The cutoff rank in 2024 were between 21 to 6872, wherein MCh in Hand Surgery was the hardest course and DNB in Cardiology, the easiest, for the General AI quota. To know more, see below and use the filters provided.

From this section, students can either view or download the consolidated PDF lists for admission to DM, MCh, and DNB via the NEET PG entrance examination. The table below contains year and round-wise counselling rounds cutoff.

Manipal University MET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to its affiliated colleges for their Enginerring and Medical courses. The cutoff was released in the form of ranks for all categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category candidates, the last round closing ranks for admission to B.Tech CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) programme was 12751 for Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff for the same course in the same college w

Manipal University MET Cutoff 2025 can be seen in the table below for all categories belonging to the All India quota. Students can also refer to the table below to know the cutoff for 2024 and 2023. In 2025, the cutoff for B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was 15046 for a seat at Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. For MPharma in Pharmaceutical Analysis course, the 2025 last round cutoff was 564 for the General AI category.
The MET entrance examination cutoff has been published for all rounds and categories for 2025. Students can refer to the table below to know the essential timeline for next admission year.
Candidates can check the table below to see the year and round-wise consolidated PDF list for Manipal University MET Counselling Rounds. Students can also download these lists for future use.

Manipal University NEET MDS Cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the MDS course specialisations. For the General AI category candidates, the cutoff ranged was 2623 to 16716, according to the first and last round closing cutoff ranks. In the last round closing cutoff, the course which had the lowest rank, ie., the highest competition was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery course. In contrast, the easiest course for admission was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Pathology and Oral Microb

In this section, candidates can compare past years cutoff ranks for various MDS courses. According to the Manipal University MDS Cutoff 2025, the most competitive MDS branch for admission was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, with the last round cutoff being 2623 for the General AI category. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course and category was 2825, and in 2023, it was 3983. Considering the cutoff trend we can say that the competition has been increasing for this category and course.
Aspirants can refer to the table below to see the Manipal University NEET MDS Counselling Rounds consolidated PDF list for different years, ie., 2025, 2024 and 2023, and various rounds.

In this section, students can compare different year cutoff data with each other, ie., of 2025, 2024 plus 2023. According to the Manipal University MBBS cutoff 2025 via the Karnataka NEET UG exam, the cutoff for the General AI category was 5766 in the last round, whereas for the SC AI category, the cutoff was 123662 for the same course. Analysing these two categories cutoffs, we can say that the cutoff for the OBC AI is lenient when compared to the General AI category.

Manipal University DASA UG Cutoff 2025 is valid for admission to the BE/BTech and BArch courses. Students who are willing to take admission at Manipal University can check out the table below to know the DASA UG Cutoff 2022 and previous years cutoffs for different categories and rounds.

highlights.description:
One of India’s top institutes is Manipal University. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #14 under the category Overall, #3 under University, #59 under Engineering, #19 under Research Institutions, and #5 under SDGs Institutions. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #901-950 position. Manipal University is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the Manipal University rankings.

nirf.description:
Manipal University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #14, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University climbed 1 rank to #3 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Research Institutions' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Manipal University climbed 4 ranks to #19 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

In the 'Deemed To Be University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'Deemed To Be University' category by the Outlook ranking.

qs_world.description:
Manipal University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, Manipal University climbed 50 ranks to #851 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Manipal University fell 9 ranks to #206 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Manipal University fell 1 rank to #36 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description:
Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) has a separate hostel section under the management of Hostel Management Committee. This committee is headed by its Chairperson. All the hostels of the University are divided into three campuses. The hostels of medical, dental and paramedical colleges at Manipal are grouped under Chief Warden, MU, Manipal Campus; the hostels of engineering, management and other colleges located at Manipal Institute of Technology complex are grouped under Chief Warden, MIT Campus; and the hostels at Mangalore Campus are grouped under Chief Warden, Mangalore Campus.

It is desirable that all students stay in the University Hostels. It is mandatory for all first year students to reside in the Hostels. However, first year students desirous of staying outside under own arrangements must submit a consent letter from their Parents duly recommended by their HOI and forward it to Director, Student Affairs for necessary permission. These students must also give their local address, contact/mobile number and subsequent changes if any to their College Office and Director, student Affairs without fail.

college_info.college_name: Manipal University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Manipal Academy of Higher Education offers scholarships to both undergraduate and postgraduate students. The institute also offers financial aid to Indian / Domestic (General Category) students.
Below are the major highlights of Manipal Academy of Higher Education:
No of Scholarships
Types of scholarships
Kalam - Pai, Freeship and Scholar Scholarships for MBBS & BDS, Merit Scholarship for Post Graduate (PG) Medical / Dental and Super Specialty Programs, etc
Waiver range
Manipal Academy of Higher Education awards 17 types of scholarships to the eligible students. Below are the detailed information regarding MAHE scholarships:
1. Kalam - Pai, Freeship and Scholar Scholarships for MBBS & BDS:
This scholarship involves 100 % waiver of course fee and hostel fee.

These scholarships are offered to students peruising MBBS from Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) at Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Manipal, Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Mangalore and Manipal TATA Medical College (MTMC) Jamshedpur, Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) at Manipal College of Dental Sciences (MCODS) Manipal & Manipal College of Dental Sciences (MCODS) Mangalore.
Below are the KALAM – PAI scholarship guidelines:
This scholarship is limited to 5 % of the General category intake, and below mentioned tables shows the total scholarship seats program-wise & campus-wise:

Scholarships Criteria: Students should have scored 80% aggregate of Physics + Chemistry + Biology (as per eligibility criteria) in Class 12 from a recognised board.
2. Merit Scholarship for Post Graduate (PG) Medical / Dental and Super Specialty Programs
MAHE Manipal offers merit scholarship for the following Post Graduate (PG) and Super Speciality (SS) programmes:

3. FREESHIP, SCHOLAR and ACHIEVER Scholarships for BTech
MAHE Manipal offers Freeship, Scholar and Achiever scholarship to meritorious BTech students at:
Scholarship Criteria:

Student should have passed with 80% aggregate of Mathematics + Physics + Optional subject (as per selection criteria) in Class 12 from the recognised Board. Also, minimum 8 CGPA & above is needed, with no backlogs in Semester 1 of BTech programme.

Freeship & Scholar Category Scholarships: This Scholarship constitutes 5 % of the GENERAL category intake for each branch and is applicable for the entire program duration, starting from 1st year of the programme.
Freeship
Scholar
MET Rank Range

Achiever Category Scholarship: This constitutes 5 % of the general category intake for each branch and is applicable at the beginning of 2nd year, 3rd year and 4th year based on the annual academic performance of the immediate previous year i.e. 1st year, 2nd year and 3rd year. No scholarship is offered based on the performance in the final year.
4. Freeship, Scholars and Achiever Scholarship for BPharm

MAHE Manipal offers Freeship, Scholar and Achiever scholarship to meritorious students admitted to the Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) program at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) Manipal
Scholarship Criteria
Students should have passed with 80 % in Chemistry + Physics + Biology / Mathematics in Class 12  from a recognised board.
Freeship & Scholar category Scholarships constitute 5 % of the general category intake and is applicable for the entire programme duration, starting from 1st year of the programme.

Achiever category Scholarship constitute 5 % of the general category intake (excluding Freeship & Scholar scholarship students) and is applicable from the beginning of 2nd year, 3rd year and 4th year which is based on the annual academic performance in the immediate previous year which include 1st year, 2nd year and 3rd year. No scholarship is offered based on the performance in the final year.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: K. G. Mittal Ayurved College, Mumbai, review by a medical student:

review_content.Placements: One becomes a good doctor after graduating from here. As a student of this institute, I have witnessed many of my seniors working in hospitals, cracking government exams, and practicing in their own setups. The students who graduate from here are all-rounders; they are into everything, like pursuing PG from top colleges, some have their own setups, and some even have a digital presence, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided are very good. Whatever a medical student needs is all available. There is a well-equipped library, sports room, proper labs, dissection hall, and common rooms as well. The canteen is good and hygienic. Other amenities like sports equipment, e-library, boys' and girls' common rooms, etc., are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The best college with every facility.

review_content.Placements: Our course is good, and many courses and packages are offered. About 80% of students got internships. Many opportunities are provided in this college as it is the best college, students placed in our course are more than 1000, and maximum packages are recruited from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided with Wi-Fi, and the lab is there. The hostel is not provided, and other games and spots room is well-equipped. The labs and library are good with maximum kinds of stuff, and labs are proper with practical instruments and room facilities in the canteen are hygienic food with moderate price. All events and fests are organised.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a very good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of the students get placed from our medical college. It is the best college. We are the future doctor to serve you. We treat with ayurvedic medicine. It is the ancient medicine which we are practising. The highest salary package offered was 1 lac per month, & the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. Every student serves their patients with the best and patient revive good health services.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very good infrastructure with all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, E-library, etc. We are enjoying it in every except like study, etc. The hostels are A1, and the food served is hygienic. Sports & games take place. Food served is always fresh and good for health. Everyone enjoys it. In our canteen, misal pav is famous, and we like to eat it. South Indian food is also available in morn time 11 o clock and later Chinese food is also available.

faqs.answer: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

overview_faqs.question: Can K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College is a reputed institute for MD, B.A.M.S. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College has a review rating of 4.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 5 on campuslife, 5 on placements, 5 on faculty and 5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: A Student's Perspective on the Campus Life and Curriculum.

content.Placements: After a 4 and 1/2 year course, everyone has to complete an internship in a government Ayurveda college for 6 months, 3 months in PHC, and 3 months in casualty of any civil and rural hospital. No company comes for placement in our college. After our degree, we joined hospitals and did PG.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is 1 building of 11 floors, out of which floors 6 to 10 are used for other purposes/not for academics. There is no hostel, garden, or gym. One canteen is there, and the quality is average. One big library is on the 5th floor, and the hospital is from the 1st to the 4th floor.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: K. G. Mittal Ayurved College, Mumbai, review by a medical student:

content.Placements: One becomes a good doctor after graduating from here. As a student of this institute, I have witnessed many of my seniors working in hospitals, cracking government exams, and practicing in their own setups. The students who graduate from here are all-rounders; they are into everything, like pursuing PG from top colleges, some have their own setups, and some even have a digital presence, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided are very good. Whatever a medical student needs is all available. There is a well-equipped library, sports room, proper labs, dissection hall, and common rooms as well. The canteen is good and hygienic. Other amenities like sports equipment, e-library, boys' and girls' common rooms, etc., are also available.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best college with every facility.

content.Placements: Our course is good, and many courses and packages are offered. About 80% of students got internships. Many opportunities are provided in this college as it is the best college, students placed in our course are more than 1000, and maximum packages are recruited from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided with Wi-Fi, and the lab is there. The hostel is not provided, and other games and spots room is well-equipped. The labs and library are good with maximum kinds of stuff, and labs are proper with practical instruments and room facilities in the canteen are hygienic food with moderate price. All events and fests are organised.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a very good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 70% of the students get placed from our medical college. It is the best college. We are the future doctor to serve you. We treat with ayurvedic medicine. It is the ancient medicine which we are practising. The highest salary package offered was 1 lac per month, & the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. Every student serves their patients with the best and patient revive good health services.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very good infrastructure with all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, E-library, etc. We are enjoying it in every except like study, etc. The hostels are A1, and the food served is hygienic. Sports & games take place. Food served is always fresh and good for health. Everyone enjoys it. In our canteen, misal pav is famous, and we like to eat it. South Indian food is also available in morn time 11 o clock and later Chinese food is also available.

paragraphs: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG and PG level in the field of Medicine and Health Sciences. courses_data.name: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College B.A.M.S. Admission 2025

courses_data.name: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College MD Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Medicine & Health Sciences can enroll in theK.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College MDprogramme, which lasts for 3 years. Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the MD programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes.
Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur
Result awaited candidates can also apply.
The lower age limit is 17 yea
